26#ifndef IMGUI_DEFINE_MATH_OPERATORS
27#define IMGUI_DEFINE_MATH_OPERATORS
28#endif
29#include "implot.h"
30#ifndef IMGUI_DISABLE
31#include "implot_internal.h"
32
33//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
34// [SECTION] Macros and Defines
35//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
36
37#define SQRT_1_2 0.70710678118f
38#define SQRT_3_2 0.86602540378f
39
40#ifndef IMPLOT_NO_FORCE_INLINE
41 #ifdef _MSC_VER
42 #define IMPLOT_INLINE __forceinline
43 #elif defined(__GNUC__)
44 #define IMPLOT_INLINE inline __attribute__((__always_inline__))
45 #elif defined(__CLANG__)
46 #if __has_attribute(__always_inline__)
47 #define IMPLOT_INLINE inline __attribute__((__always_inline__))
48 #else
49 #define IMPLOT_INLINE inline
50 #endif
51 #else
52 #define IMPLOT_INLINE inline
53 #endif
54#else
55 #define IMPLOT_INLINE inline
56#endif
57
58#if defined __SSE__ || defined __x86_64__ || defined _M_X64
59#ifndef IMGUI_ENABLE_SSE
60#include <immintrin.h>
61#endif
62static IMPLOT_INLINE float ImInvSqrt(float x) { return _mm_cvtss_f32(_mm_rsqrt_ss(_mm_set_ss(x))); }
63#else
64static IMPLOT_INLINE float ImInvSqrt(float x) { return 1.0f / sqrtf(x); }
65#endif
66
67#define IMPLOT_NORMALIZE2F_OVER_ZERO(VX,VY) do { float d2 = VX*VX + VY*VY; if (d2 > 0.0f) { float inv_len = ImInvSqrt(d2); VX *= inv_len; VY *= inv_len; } } while (0)
68
69// Support for pre-1.82 versions. Users on 1.82+ can use 0 (default) flags to mean "all corners" but in order to support older versions we are more explicit.
70#if (IMGUI_VERSION_NUM < 18102) && !defined(ImDrawFlags_RoundCornersAll)
71#define ImDrawFlags_RoundCornersAll ImDrawCornerFlags_All
72#endif
73
74//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
75// [SECTION] Template instantiation utility
76//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
77
78// By default, templates are instantiated for `float`, `double`, and for the following integer types, which are defined in imgui.h:
79// signed char ImS8; // 8-bit signed integer
80// unsigned char ImU8; // 8-bit unsigned integer
81// signed short ImS16; // 16-bit signed integer
82// unsigned short ImU16; // 16-bit unsigned integer
83// signed int ImS32; // 32-bit signed integer == int
84// unsigned int ImU32; // 32-bit unsigned integer
85// signed long long ImS64; // 64-bit signed integer
86// unsigned long long ImU64; // 64-bit unsigned integer
87// (note: this list does *not* include `long`, `unsigned long` and `long double`)
88//
89// You can customize the supported types by defining IMPLOT_CUSTOM_NUMERIC_TYPES at compile time to define your own type list.
90// As an example, you could use the compile time define given by the line below in order to support only float and double.
91// -DIMPLOT_CUSTOM_NUMERIC_TYPES="(float)(double)"
92// In order to support all known C++ types, use:
93// -DIMPLOT_CUSTOM_NUMERIC_TYPES="(signed char)(unsigned char)(signed short)(unsigned short)(signed int)(unsigned int)(signed long)(unsigned long)(signed long long)(unsigned long long)(float)(double)(long double)"
94
95#ifdef IMPLOT_CUSTOM_NUMERIC_TYPES
96 #define IMPLOT_NUMERIC_TYPES IMPLOT_CUSTOM_NUMERIC_TYPES
97#else
98 #define IMPLOT_NUMERIC_TYPES (ImS8)(ImU8)(ImS16)(ImU16)(ImS32)(ImU32)(ImS64)(ImU64)(float)(double)
99#endif
100
101// CALL_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES will duplicate the template instantiation code `INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T)` on supported types.
102#define _CAT(x, y) _CAT_(x, y)
103#define _CAT_(x,y) x ## y
104#define _INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES(chain) _CAT(_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES_1 chain, _END)
105#define _INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES_1(T) INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T) _INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES_2
106#define _INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES_2(T) INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T) _INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES_1
107#define _INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES_1_END
108#define _INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES_2_END
109#define CALL_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES() _INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES(IMPLOT_NUMERIC_TYPES)
110
111namespace ImPlot {
112
113//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
114// [SECTION] Utils
115//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
116
117// Calc maximum index size of ImDrawIdx
118template <typename T>
119struct MaxIdx { static const unsigned int Value; };
120template <> const unsigned int MaxIdx<unsigned short>::Value = 65535;
121template <> const unsigned int MaxIdx<unsigned int>::Value = 4294967295;
122
123IMPLOT_INLINE void GetLineRenderProps(const ImDrawList& draw_list, float& half_weight, ImVec2& tex_uv0, ImVec2& tex_uv1) {
124 const bool aa = ImHasFlag(draw_list.Flags, ImDrawListFlags_AntiAliasedLines) &&
125 ImHasFlag(draw_list.Flags, ImDrawListFlags_AntiAliasedLinesUseTex);
126 if (aa) {
127 ImVec4 tex_uvs = draw_list._Data->TexUvLines[(int)(half_weight*2)];
128 tex_uv0 = ImVec2(tex_uvs.x, tex_uvs.y);
129 tex_uv1 = ImVec2(tex_uvs.z, tex_uvs.w);
130 half_weight += 1;
131 }
132 else {
133 tex_uv0 = tex_uv1 = draw_list._Data->TexUvWhitePixel;
134 }
135}
136
137IMPLOT_INLINE void PrimLine(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImVec2& P1, const ImVec2& P2, float half_weight, ImU32 col, const ImVec2& tex_uv0, const ImVec2 tex_uv1) {
138 float dx = P2.x - P1.x;
139 float dy = P2.y - P1.y;
140 IMPLOT_NORMALIZE2F_OVER_ZERO(dx, dy);
141 dx *= half_weight;
142 dy *= half_weight;
143 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].pos.x = P1.x + dy;
144 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].pos.y = P1.y - dx;
145 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].uv = tex_uv0;
146 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].col = col;
147 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[1].pos.x = P2.x + dy;
148 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[1].pos.y = P2.y - dx;
149 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[1].uv = tex_uv0;
150 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[1].col = col;
151 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[2].pos.x = P2.x - dy;
152 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[2].pos.y = P2.y + dx;
153 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[2].uv = tex_uv1;
154 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[2].col = col;
155 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[3].pos.x = P1.x - dy;
156 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[3].pos.y = P1.y + dx;
157 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[3].uv = tex_uv1;
158 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[3].col = col;
159 draw_list._VtxWritePtr += 4;
160 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[0] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx);
161 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[1] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 1);
162 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[2] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 2);
163 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[3] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx);
164 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[4] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 2);
165 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[5] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 3);
166 draw_list._IdxWritePtr += 6;
167 draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx += 4;
168}
169
170IMPLOT_INLINE void PrimRectFill(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImVec2& Pmin, const ImVec2& Pmax, ImU32 col, const ImVec2& uv) {
171 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].pos = Pmin;
172 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].uv = uv;
173 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].col = col;
174 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[1].pos = Pmax;
175 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[1].uv = uv;
176 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[1].col = col;
177 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[2].pos.x = Pmin.x;
178 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[2].pos.y = Pmax.y;
179 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[2].uv = uv;
180 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[2].col = col;
181 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[3].pos.x = Pmax.x;
182 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[3].pos.y = Pmin.y;
183 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[3].uv = uv;
184 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[3].col = col;
185 draw_list._VtxWritePtr += 4;
186 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[0] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx);
187 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[1] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 1);
188 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[2] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 2);
189 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[3] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx);
190 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[4] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 1);
191 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[5] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 3);
192 draw_list._IdxWritePtr += 6;
193 draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx += 4;
194}
195
196IMPLOT_INLINE void PrimRectLine(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImVec2& Pmin, const ImVec2& Pmax, float weight, ImU32 col, const ImVec2& uv) {
197
198 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].pos.x = Pmin.x;
199 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].pos.y = Pmin.y;
200 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].uv = uv;
201 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].col = col;
202
203 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[1].pos.x = Pmin.x;
204 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[1].pos.y = Pmax.y;
205 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[1].uv = uv;
206 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[1].col = col;
207
208 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[2].pos.x = Pmax.x;
209 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[2].pos.y = Pmax.y;
210 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[2].uv = uv;
211 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[2].col = col;
212
213 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[3].pos.x = Pmax.x;
214 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[3].pos.y = Pmin.y;
215 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[3].uv = uv;
216 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[3].col = col;
217
218 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[4].pos.x = Pmin.x + weight;
219 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[4].pos.y = Pmin.y + weight;
220 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[4].uv = uv;
221 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[4].col = col;
222
223 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[5].pos.x = Pmin.x + weight;
224 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[5].pos.y = Pmax.y - weight;
225 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[5].uv = uv;
226 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[5].col = col;
227
228 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[6].pos.x = Pmax.x - weight;
229 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[6].pos.y = Pmax.y - weight;
230 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[6].uv = uv;
231 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[6].col = col;
232
233 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[7].pos.x = Pmax.x - weight;
234 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[7].pos.y = Pmin.y + weight;
235 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[7].uv = uv;
236 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[7].col = col;
237
238 draw_list._VtxWritePtr += 8;
239
240 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[0] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 0);
241 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[1] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 1);
242 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[2] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 5);
243 draw_list._IdxWritePtr += 3;
244
245 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[0] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 0);
246 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[1] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 5);
247 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[2] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 4);
248 draw_list._IdxWritePtr += 3;
249
250 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[0] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 1);
251 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[1] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 2);
252 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[2] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 6);
253 draw_list._IdxWritePtr += 3;
254
255 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[0] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 1);
256 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[1] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 6);
257 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[2] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 5);
258 draw_list._IdxWritePtr += 3;
259
260 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[0] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 2);
261 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[1] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 3);
262 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[2] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 7);
263 draw_list._IdxWritePtr += 3;
264
265 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[0] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 2);
266 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[1] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 7);
267 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[2] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 6);
268 draw_list._IdxWritePtr += 3;
269
270 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[0] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 3);
271 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[1] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 0);
272 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[2] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 4);
273 draw_list._IdxWritePtr += 3;
274
275 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[0] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 3);
276 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[1] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 4);
277 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[2] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 7);
278 draw_list._IdxWritePtr += 3;
279
280 draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx += 8;
281}
282
283
284//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
285// [SECTION] Item Utils
286//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
287
288ImPlotItem* RegisterOrGetItem(const char* label_id, ImPlotItemFlags flags, bool* just_created) {
289 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
290 ImPlotItemGroup& Items = *gp.CurrentItems;
291 ImGuiID id = Items.GetItemID(label_id);
292 if (just_created != nullptr)
293 *just_created = Items.GetItem(id) == nullptr;
294 ImPlotItem* item = Items.GetOrAddItem(id);
295 if (item->SeenThisFrame)
296 return item;
297 item->SeenThisFrame = true;
298 int idx = Items.GetItemIndex(item);
299 item->ID = id;
300 if (!ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotItemFlags_NoLegend) && ImGui::FindRenderedTextEnd(label_id, nullptr) != label_id) {
301 Items.Legend.Indices.push_back(idx);
302 item->NameOffset = Items.Legend.Labels.size();
303 Items.Legend.Labels.append(label_id, label_id + strlen(label_id) + 1);
304 }
305 else {
306 item->Show = true;
307 }
308 return item;
309}
310
311ImPlotItem* GetItem(const char* label_id) {
312 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
313 return gp.CurrentItems->GetItem(label_id);
314}
315
316bool IsItemHidden(const char* label_id) {
317 ImPlotItem* item = GetItem(label_id);
318 return item != nullptr && !item->Show;
319}
320
321ImPlotItem* GetCurrentItem() {
322 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
323 return gp.CurrentItem;
324}
325
326void SetNextLineStyle(const ImVec4& col, float weight) {
327 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
328 gp.NextItemData.Colors[ImPlotCol_Line] = col;
329 gp.NextItemData.LineWeight = weight;
330}
331
332void SetNextFillStyle(const ImVec4& col, float alpha) {
333 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
334 gp.NextItemData.Colors[ImPlotCol_Fill] = col;
335 gp.NextItemData.FillAlpha = alpha;
336}
337
338void SetNextMarkerStyle(ImPlotMarker marker, float size, const ImVec4& fill, float weight, const ImVec4& outline) {
339 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
340 gp.NextItemData.Marker = marker;
341 gp.NextItemData.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerFill] = fill;
342 gp.NextItemData.MarkerSize = size;
343 gp.NextItemData.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerOutline] = outline;
344 gp.NextItemData.MarkerWeight = weight;
345}
346
347void SetNextErrorBarStyle(const ImVec4& col, float size, float weight) {
348 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
349 gp.NextItemData.Colors[ImPlotCol_ErrorBar] = col;
350 gp.NextItemData.ErrorBarSize = size;
351 gp.NextItemData.ErrorBarWeight = weight;
352}
353
354ImVec4 GetLastItemColor() {
355 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
356 if (gp.PreviousItem)
357 return ImGui::ColorConvertU32ToFloat4(gp.PreviousItem->Color);
358 return ImVec4();
359}
360
361void BustItemCache() {
362 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
363 for (int p = 0; p < gp.Plots.GetBufSize(); ++p) {
364 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.Plots.GetByIndex(p);
365 plot.Items.Reset();
366 }
367 for (int p = 0; p < gp.Subplots.GetBufSize(); ++p) {
368 ImPlotSubplot& subplot = *gp.Subplots.GetByIndex(p);
369 subplot.Items.Reset();
370 }
371}
372
373void BustColorCache(const char* plot_title_id) {
374 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
375 if (plot_title_id == nullptr) {
376 BustItemCache();
377 }
378 else {
379 ImGuiID id = ImGui::GetCurrentWindow()->GetID(plot_title_id);
380 ImPlotPlot* plot = gp.Plots.GetByKey(id);
381 if (plot != nullptr)
382 plot->Items.Reset();
383 else {
384 ImPlotSubplot* subplot = gp.Subplots.GetByKey(id);
385 if (subplot != nullptr)
386 subplot->Items.Reset();
387 }
388 }
389}
390
391//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
392// [SECTION] BeginItem / EndItem
393//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
394
395static const float ITEM_HIGHLIGHT_LINE_SCALE = 2.0f;
396static const float ITEM_HIGHLIGHT_MARK_SCALE = 1.25f;
397
398// Begins a new item. Returns false if the item should not be plotted.
399bool BeginItem(const char* label_id, ImPlotItemFlags flags, ImPlotCol recolor_from) {
400 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
401 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "PlotX() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
402 SetupLock();
403 bool just_created;
404 ImPlotItem* item = RegisterOrGetItem(label_id, flags, &just_created);
405 // set current item
406 gp.CurrentItem = item;
407 ImPlotNextItemData& s = gp.NextItemData;
408 // set/override item color
409 if (recolor_from != -1) {
410 if (!IsColorAuto(s.Colors[recolor_from]))
411 item->Color = ImGui::ColorConvertFloat4ToU32(s.Colors[recolor_from]);
412 else if (!IsColorAuto(gp.Style.Colors[recolor_from]))
413 item->Color = ImGui::ColorConvertFloat4ToU32(gp.Style.Colors[recolor_from]);
414 else if (just_created)
415 item->Color = NextColormapColorU32();
416 }
417 else if (just_created) {
418 item->Color = NextColormapColorU32();
419 }
420 // hide/show item
421 if (gp.NextItemData.HasHidden) {
422 if (just_created || gp.NextItemData.HiddenCond == ImGuiCond_Always)
423 item->Show = !gp.NextItemData.Hidden;
424 }
425 if (!item->Show) {
426 // reset next item data
427 gp.NextItemData.Reset();
428 gp.PreviousItem = item;
429 gp.CurrentItem = nullptr;
430 return false;
431 }
432 else {
433 ImVec4 item_color = ImGui::ColorConvertU32ToFloat4(item->Color);
434 // stage next item colors
435 s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Line] = IsColorAuto(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Line]) ? ( IsColorAuto(ImPlotCol_Line) ? item_color : gp.Style.Colors[ImPlotCol_Line] ) : s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Line];
436 s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Fill] = IsColorAuto(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Fill]) ? ( IsColorAuto(ImPlotCol_Fill) ? item_color : gp.Style.Colors[ImPlotCol_Fill] ) : s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Fill];
437 s.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerOutline] = IsColorAuto(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerOutline]) ? ( IsColorAuto(ImPlotCol_MarkerOutline) ? s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Line] : gp.Style.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerOutline] ) : s.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerOutline];
438 s.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerFill] = IsColorAuto(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerFill]) ? ( IsColorAuto(ImPlotCol_MarkerFill) ? s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Line] : gp.Style.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerFill] ) : s.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerFill];
439 s.Colors[ImPlotCol_ErrorBar] = IsColorAuto(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_ErrorBar]) ? ( GetStyleColorVec4(ImPlotCol_ErrorBar) ) : s.Colors[ImPlotCol_ErrorBar];
440 // stage next item style vars
441 s.LineWeight = s.LineWeight < 0 ? gp.Style.LineWeight : s.LineWeight;
442 s.Marker = s.Marker < 0 ? gp.Style.Marker : s.Marker;
443 s.MarkerSize = s.MarkerSize < 0 ? gp.Style.MarkerSize : s.MarkerSize;
444 s.MarkerWeight = s.MarkerWeight < 0 ? gp.Style.MarkerWeight : s.MarkerWeight;
445 s.FillAlpha = s.FillAlpha < 0 ? gp.Style.FillAlpha : s.FillAlpha;
446 s.ErrorBarSize = s.ErrorBarSize < 0 ? gp.Style.ErrorBarSize : s.ErrorBarSize;
447 s.ErrorBarWeight = s.ErrorBarWeight < 0 ? gp.Style.ErrorBarWeight : s.ErrorBarWeight;
448 s.DigitalBitHeight = s.DigitalBitHeight < 0 ? gp.Style.DigitalBitHeight : s.DigitalBitHeight;
449 s.DigitalBitGap = s.DigitalBitGap < 0 ? gp.Style.DigitalBitGap : s.DigitalBitGap;
450 // apply alpha modifier(s)
451 s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Fill].w *= s.FillAlpha;
452 s.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerFill].w *= s.FillAlpha; // TODO: this should be separate, if it at all
453 // apply highlight mods
454 if (item->LegendHovered) {
455 if (!ImHasFlag(gp.CurrentItems->Legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_NoHighlightItem)) {
456 s.LineWeight *= ITEM_HIGHLIGHT_LINE_SCALE;
457 s.MarkerSize *= ITEM_HIGHLIGHT_MARK_SCALE;
458 s.MarkerWeight *= ITEM_HIGHLIGHT_LINE_SCALE;
459 // TODO: how to highlight fills?
460 }
461 if (!ImHasFlag(gp.CurrentItems->Legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_NoHighlightAxis)) {
462 if (gp.CurrentPlot->EnabledAxesX() > 1)
463 gp.CurrentPlot->Axes[gp.CurrentPlot->CurrentX].ColorHiLi = item->Color;
464 if (gp.CurrentPlot->EnabledAxesY() > 1)
465 gp.CurrentPlot->Axes[gp.CurrentPlot->CurrentY].ColorHiLi = item->Color;
466 }
467 }
468 // set render flags
469 s.RenderLine = s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Line].w > 0 && s.LineWeight > 0;
470 s.RenderFill = s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Fill].w > 0;
471 s.RenderMarkerFill = s.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerFill].w > 0;
472 s.RenderMarkerLine = s.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerOutline].w > 0 && s.MarkerWeight > 0;
473 // push rendering clip rect
474 PushPlotClipRect();
475 return true;
476 }
477}
478
479// Ends an item (call only if BeginItem returns true)
480void EndItem() {
481 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
482 // pop rendering clip rect
483 PopPlotClipRect();
484 // reset next item data
485 gp.NextItemData.Reset();
486 // set current item
487 gp.PreviousItem = gp.CurrentItem;
488 gp.CurrentItem = nullptr;
489}
490
491//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
492// [SECTION] Indexers
493//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
494
495template <typename T>
496IMPLOT_INLINE T IndexData(const T* data, int idx, int count, int offset, int stride) {
497 const int s = ((offset == 0) << 0) | ((stride == sizeof(T)) << 1);
498 switch (s) {
499 case 3 : return data[idx];
500 case 2 : return data[(offset + idx) % count];
501 case 1 : return *(const T*)(const void*)((const unsigned char*)data + (size_t)((idx) ) * stride);
502 case 0 : return *(const T*)(const void*)((const unsigned char*)data + (size_t)((offset + idx) % count) * stride);
503 default: return T(0);
504 }
505}
506
507template <typename T>
508struct IndexerIdx {
509 IndexerIdx(const T* data, int count, int offset = 0, int stride = sizeof(T)) :
510 Data(data),
511 Count(count),
512 Offset(count ? ImPosMod(offset, count) : 0),
513 Stride(stride)
514 { }
515 template <typename I> IMPLOT_INLINE double operator()(I idx) const {
516 return (double)IndexData(Data, idx, Count, Offset, Stride);
517 }
518 const T* Data;
519 int Count;
520 int Offset;
521 int Stride;
522};
523
524template <typename _Indexer1, typename _Indexer2>
525struct IndexerAdd {
526 IndexerAdd(const _Indexer1& indexer1, const _Indexer2& indexer2, double scale1 = 1, double scale2 = 1)
527 : Indexer1(indexer1),
528 Indexer2(indexer2),
529 Scale1(scale1),
530 Scale2(scale2),
531 Count(ImMin(Indexer1.Count, Indexer2.Count))
532 { }
533 template <typename I> IMPLOT_INLINE double operator()(I idx) const {
534 return Scale1 * Indexer1(idx) + Scale2 * Indexer2(idx);
535 }
536 const _Indexer1& Indexer1;
537 const _Indexer2& Indexer2;
538 double Scale1;
539 double Scale2;
540 int Count;
541};
542
543struct IndexerLin {
544 IndexerLin(double m, double b) : M(m), B(b) { }
545 template <typename I> IMPLOT_INLINE double operator()(I idx) const {
546 return M * idx + B;
547 }
548 const double M;
549 const double B;
550};
551
552struct IndexerConst {
553 IndexerConst(double ref) : Ref(ref) { }
554 template <typename I> IMPLOT_INLINE double operator()(I) const { return Ref; }
555 const double Ref;
556};
557
558//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
559// [SECTION] Getters
560//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
561
562template <typename _IndexerX, typename _IndexerY>
563struct GetterXY {
564 GetterXY(_IndexerX x, _IndexerY y, int count) : IndxerX(x), IndxerY(y), Count(count) { }
565 template <typename I> IMPLOT_INLINE ImPlotPoint operator()(I idx) const {
566 return ImPlotPoint(IndxerX(idx),IndxerY(idx));
567 }
568 const _IndexerX IndxerX;
569 const _IndexerY IndxerY;
570 const int Count;
571};
572
574struct GetterFuncPtr {
575 GetterFuncPtr(ImPlotGetter getter, void* data, int count) :
576 Getter(getter),
577 Data(data),
578 Count(count)
579 { }
580 template <typename I> IMPLOT_INLINE ImPlotPoint operator()(I idx) const {
581 return Getter(idx, Data);
582 }
583 ImPlotGetter Getter;
584 void* const Data;
585 const int Count;
586};
587
588template <typename _Getter>
589struct GetterOverrideX {
590 GetterOverrideX(_Getter getter, double x) : Getter(getter), X(x), Count(getter.Count) { }
591 template <typename I> IMPLOT_INLINE ImPlotPoint operator()(I idx) const {
592 ImPlotPoint p = Getter(idx);
593 p.x = X;
594 return p;
595 }
596 const _Getter Getter;
597 const double X;
598 const int Count;
599};
600
601template <typename _Getter>
602struct GetterOverrideY {
603 GetterOverrideY(_Getter getter, double y) : Getter(getter), Y(y), Count(getter.Count) { }
604 template <typename I> IMPLOT_INLINE ImPlotPoint operator()(I idx) const {
605 ImPlotPoint p = Getter(idx);
606 p.y = Y;
607 return p;
608 }
609 const _Getter Getter;
610 const double Y;
611 const int Count;
612};
613
614template <typename _Getter>
615struct GetterLoop {
616 GetterLoop(_Getter getter) : Getter(getter), Count(getter.Count + 1) { }
617 template <typename I> IMPLOT_INLINE ImPlotPoint operator()(I idx) const {
618 idx = idx % (Count - 1);
619 return Getter(idx);
620 }
621 const _Getter Getter;
622 const int Count;
623};
624
625template <typename T>
626struct GetterError {
627 GetterError(const T* xs, const T* ys, const T* neg, const T* pos, int count, int offset, int stride) :
628 Xs(xs),
629 Ys(ys),
630 Neg(neg),
631 Pos(pos),
632 Count(count),
633 Offset(count ? ImPosMod(offset, count) : 0),
634 Stride(stride)
635 { }
636 template <typename I> IMPLOT_INLINE ImPlotPointError operator()(I idx) const {
637 return ImPlotPointError((double)IndexData(Xs, idx, Count, Offset, Stride),
638 (double)IndexData(Ys, idx, Count, Offset, Stride),
639 (double)IndexData(Neg, idx, Count, Offset, Stride),
640 (double)IndexData(Pos, idx, Count, Offset, Stride));
641 }
642 const T* const Xs;
643 const T* const Ys;
644 const T* const Neg;
645 const T* const Pos;
646 const int Count;
647 const int Offset;
648 const int Stride;
649};
650
651//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
652// [SECTION] Fitters
653//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
654
655template <typename _Getter1>
656struct Fitter1 {
657 Fitter1(const _Getter1& getter) : Getter(getter) { }
658 void Fit(ImPlotAxis& x_axis, ImPlotAxis& y_axis) const {
659 for (int i = 0; i < Getter.Count; ++i) {
660 ImPlotPoint p = Getter(i);
661 x_axis.ExtendFitWith(y_axis, p.x, p.y);
662 y_axis.ExtendFitWith(x_axis, p.y, p.x);
663 }
664 }
665 const _Getter1& Getter;
666};
667
668template <typename _Getter1>
669struct FitterX {
670 FitterX(const _Getter1& getter) : Getter(getter) { }
671 void Fit(ImPlotAxis& x_axis, ImPlotAxis&) const {
672 for (int i = 0; i < Getter.Count; ++i) {
673 ImPlotPoint p = Getter(i);
674 x_axis.ExtendFit(p.x);
675 }
676 }
677 const _Getter1& Getter;
678};
679
680template <typename _Getter1>
681struct FitterY {
682 FitterY(const _Getter1& getter) : Getter(getter) { }
683 void Fit(ImPlotAxis&, ImPlotAxis& y_axis) const {
684 for (int i = 0; i < Getter.Count; ++i) {
685 ImPlotPoint p = Getter(i);
686 y_axis.ExtendFit(p.y);
687 }
688 }
689 const _Getter1& Getter;
690};
691
692template <typename _Getter1, typename _Getter2>
693struct Fitter2 {
694 Fitter2(const _Getter1& getter1, const _Getter2& getter2) : Getter1(getter1), Getter2(getter2) { }
695 void Fit(ImPlotAxis& x_axis, ImPlotAxis& y_axis) const {
696 for (int i = 0; i < Getter1.Count; ++i) {
697 ImPlotPoint p = Getter1(i);
698 x_axis.ExtendFitWith(y_axis, p.x, p.y);
699 y_axis.ExtendFitWith(x_axis, p.y, p.x);
700 }
701 for (int i = 0; i < Getter2.Count; ++i) {
702 ImPlotPoint p = Getter2(i);
703 x_axis.ExtendFitWith(y_axis, p.x, p.y);
704 y_axis.ExtendFitWith(x_axis, p.y, p.x);
705 }
706 }
707 const _Getter1& Getter1;
708 const _Getter2& Getter2;
709};
710
711template <typename _Getter1, typename _Getter2>
712struct FitterBarV {
713 FitterBarV(const _Getter1& getter1, const _Getter2& getter2, double width) :
714 Getter1(getter1),
715 Getter2(getter2),
716 HalfWidth(width*0.5)
717 { }
718 void Fit(ImPlotAxis& x_axis, ImPlotAxis& y_axis) const {
719 int count = ImMin(Getter1.Count, Getter2.Count);
720 for (int i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
721 ImPlotPoint p1 = Getter1(i); p1.x -= HalfWidth;
722 ImPlotPoint p2 = Getter2(i); p2.x += HalfWidth;
723 x_axis.ExtendFitWith(y_axis, p1.x, p1.y);
724 y_axis.ExtendFitWith(x_axis, p1.y, p1.x);
725 x_axis.ExtendFitWith(y_axis, p2.x, p2.y);
726 y_axis.ExtendFitWith(x_axis, p2.y, p2.x);
727 }
728 }
729 const _Getter1& Getter1;
730 const _Getter2& Getter2;
731 const double HalfWidth;
732};
733
734template <typename _Getter1, typename _Getter2>
735struct FitterBarH {
736 FitterBarH(const _Getter1& getter1, const _Getter2& getter2, double height) :
737 Getter1(getter1),
738 Getter2(getter2),
739 HalfHeight(height*0.5)
740 { }
741 void Fit(ImPlotAxis& x_axis, ImPlotAxis& y_axis) const {
742 int count = ImMin(Getter1.Count, Getter2.Count);
743 for (int i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
744 ImPlotPoint p1 = Getter1(i); p1.y -= HalfHeight;
745 ImPlotPoint p2 = Getter2(i); p2.y += HalfHeight;
746 x_axis.ExtendFitWith(y_axis, p1.x, p1.y);
747 y_axis.ExtendFitWith(x_axis, p1.y, p1.x);
748 x_axis.ExtendFitWith(y_axis, p2.x, p2.y);
749 y_axis.ExtendFitWith(x_axis, p2.y, p2.x);
750 }
751 }
752 const _Getter1& Getter1;
753 const _Getter2& Getter2;
754 const double HalfHeight;
755};
756
757struct FitterRect {
758 FitterRect(const ImPlotPoint& pmin, const ImPlotPoint& pmax) :
759 Pmin(pmin),
760 Pmax(pmax)
761 { }
762 FitterRect(const ImPlotRect& rect) :
763 FitterRect(rect.Min(), rect.Max())
764 { }
765 void Fit(ImPlotAxis& x_axis, ImPlotAxis& y_axis) const {
766 x_axis.ExtendFitWith(y_axis, Pmin.x, Pmin.y);
767 y_axis.ExtendFitWith(x_axis, Pmin.y, Pmin.x);
768 x_axis.ExtendFitWith(y_axis, Pmax.x, Pmax.y);
769 y_axis.ExtendFitWith(x_axis, Pmax.y, Pmax.x);
770 }
771 const ImPlotPoint Pmin;
772 const ImPlotPoint Pmax;
773};
774
775//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
776// [SECTION] Transformers
777//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
778
779struct Transformer1 {
780 Transformer1(double pixMin, double pltMin, double pltMax, double m, double scaMin, double scaMax, ImPlotTransform fwd, void* data) :
781 ScaMin(scaMin),
782 ScaMax(scaMax),
783 PltMin(pltMin),
784 PltMax(pltMax),
785 PixMin(pixMin),
786 M(m),
787 TransformFwd(fwd),
788 TransformData(data)
789 { }
790
791 template <typename T> IMPLOT_INLINE float operator()(T p) const {
792 if (TransformFwd != nullptr) {
793 double s = TransformFwd(p, TransformData);
794 double t = (s - ScaMin) / (ScaMax - ScaMin);
795 p = PltMin + (PltMax - PltMin) * t;
796 }
797 return (float)(PixMin + M * (p - PltMin));
798 }
799
800 double ScaMin, ScaMax, PltMin, PltMax, PixMin, M;
801 ImPlotTransform TransformFwd;
802 void* TransformData;
803};
804
805struct Transformer2 {
806 Transformer2(const ImPlotAxis& x_axis, const ImPlotAxis& y_axis) :
807 Tx(x_axis.PixelMin,
808 x_axis.Range.Min,
809 x_axis.Range.Max,
810 x_axis.ScaleToPixel,
811 x_axis.ScaleMin,
812 x_axis.ScaleMax,
813 x_axis.TransformForward,
814 x_axis.TransformData),
815 Ty(y_axis.PixelMin,
816 y_axis.Range.Min,
817 y_axis.Range.Max,
818 y_axis.ScaleToPixel,
819 y_axis.ScaleMin,
820 y_axis.ScaleMax,
821 y_axis.TransformForward,
822 y_axis.TransformData)
823 { }
824
825 Transformer2(const ImPlotPlot& plot) :
826 Transformer2(plot.Axes[plot.CurrentX], plot.Axes[plot.CurrentY])
827 { }
828
829 Transformer2() :
830 Transformer2(*GImPlot->CurrentPlot)
831 { }
832
833 template <typename P> IMPLOT_INLINE ImVec2 operator()(const P& plt) const {
834 ImVec2 out;
835 out.x = Tx(plt.x);
836 out.y = Ty(plt.y);
837 return out;
838 }
839
840 template <typename T> IMPLOT_INLINE ImVec2 operator()(T x, T y) const {
841 ImVec2 out;
842 out.x = Tx(x);
843 out.y = Ty(y);
844 return out;
845 }
846
847 Transformer1 Tx;
848 Transformer1 Ty;
849};
850
851//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
852// [SECTION] Renderers
853//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
854
855struct RendererBase {
856 RendererBase(int prims, int idx_consumed, int vtx_consumed) :
857 Prims(prims),
858 IdxConsumed(idx_consumed),
859 VtxConsumed(vtx_consumed)
860 { }
861 const int Prims;
862 Transformer2 Transformer;
863 const int IdxConsumed;
864 const int VtxConsumed;
865};
866
867template <class _Getter>
868struct RendererLineStrip : RendererBase {
869 RendererLineStrip(const _Getter& getter, ImU32 col, float weight) :
870 RendererBase(getter.Count - 1, 6, 4),
871 Getter(getter),
872 Col(col),
873 HalfWeight(ImMax(1.0f,weight)*0.5f)
874 {
875 P1 = this->Transformer(Getter(0));
876 }
877 void Init(ImDrawList& draw_list) const {
878 GetLineRenderProps(draw_list, HalfWeight, UV0, UV1);
879 }
880 IMPLOT_INLINE bool Render(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImRect& cull_rect, int prim) const {
881 ImVec2 P2 = this->Transformer(Getter(prim + 1));
882 if (!cull_rect.Overlaps(ImRect(ImMin(P1, P2), ImMax(P1, P2)))) {
883 P1 = P2;
884 return false;
885 }
886 PrimLine(draw_list,P1,P2,HalfWeight,Col,UV0,UV1);
887 P1 = P2;
888 return true;
889 }
890 const _Getter& Getter;
891 const ImU32 Col;
892 mutable float HalfWeight;
893 mutable ImVec2 P1;
894 mutable ImVec2 UV0;
895 mutable ImVec2 UV1;
896};
897
898template <class _Getter>
899struct RendererLineStripSkip : RendererBase {
900 RendererLineStripSkip(const _Getter& getter, ImU32 col, float weight) :
901 RendererBase(getter.Count - 1, 6, 4),
902 Getter(getter),
903 Col(col),
904 HalfWeight(ImMax(1.0f,weight)*0.5f)
905 {
906 P1 = this->Transformer(Getter(0));
907 }
908 void Init(ImDrawList& draw_list) const {
909 GetLineRenderProps(draw_list, HalfWeight, UV0, UV1);
910 }
911 IMPLOT_INLINE bool Render(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImRect& cull_rect, int prim) const {
912 ImVec2 P2 = this->Transformer(Getter(prim + 1));
913 if (!cull_rect.Overlaps(ImRect(ImMin(P1, P2), ImMax(P1, P2)))) {
914 if (!ImNan(P2.x) && !ImNan(P2.y))
915 P1 = P2;
916 return false;
917 }
918 PrimLine(draw_list,P1,P2,HalfWeight,Col,UV0,UV1);
919 if (!ImNan(P2.x) && !ImNan(P2.y))
920 P1 = P2;
921 return true;
922 }
923 const _Getter& Getter;
924 const ImU32 Col;
925 mutable float HalfWeight;
926 mutable ImVec2 P1;
927 mutable ImVec2 UV0;
928 mutable ImVec2 UV1;
929};
930
931template <class _Getter>
932struct RendererLineSegments1 : RendererBase {
933 RendererLineSegments1(const _Getter& getter, ImU32 col, float weight) :
934 RendererBase(getter.Count / 2, 6, 4),
935 Getter(getter),
936 Col(col),
937 HalfWeight(ImMax(1.0f,weight)*0.5f)
938 { }
939 void Init(ImDrawList& draw_list) const {
940 GetLineRenderProps(draw_list, HalfWeight, UV0, UV1);
941 }
942 IMPLOT_INLINE bool Render(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImRect& cull_rect, int prim) const {
943 ImVec2 P1 = this->Transformer(Getter(prim*2+0));
944 ImVec2 P2 = this->Transformer(Getter(prim*2+1));
945 if (!cull_rect.Overlaps(ImRect(ImMin(P1, P2), ImMax(P1, P2))))
946 return false;
947 PrimLine(draw_list,P1,P2,HalfWeight,Col,UV0,UV1);
948 return true;
949 }
950 const _Getter& Getter;
951 const ImU32 Col;
952 mutable float HalfWeight;
953 mutable ImVec2 UV0;
954 mutable ImVec2 UV1;
955};
956
957template <class _Getter1, class _Getter2>
958struct RendererLineSegments2 : RendererBase {
959 RendererLineSegments2(const _Getter1& getter1, const _Getter2& getter2, ImU32 col, float weight) :
960 RendererBase(ImMin(getter1.Count, getter1.Count), 6, 4),
961 Getter1(getter1),
962 Getter2(getter2),
963 Col(col),
964 HalfWeight(ImMax(1.0f,weight)*0.5f)
965 {}
966 void Init(ImDrawList& draw_list) const {
967 GetLineRenderProps(draw_list, HalfWeight, UV0, UV1);
968 }
969 IMPLOT_INLINE bool Render(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImRect& cull_rect, int prim) const {
970 ImVec2 P1 = this->Transformer(Getter1(prim));
971 ImVec2 P2 = this->Transformer(Getter2(prim));
972 if (!cull_rect.Overlaps(ImRect(ImMin(P1, P2), ImMax(P1, P2))))
973 return false;
974 PrimLine(draw_list,P1,P2,HalfWeight,Col,UV0,UV1);
975 return true;
976 }
977 const _Getter1& Getter1;
978 const _Getter2& Getter2;
979 const ImU32 Col;
980 mutable float HalfWeight;
981 mutable ImVec2 UV0;
982 mutable ImVec2 UV1;
983};
984
985template <class _Getter1, class _Getter2>
986struct RendererBarsFillV : RendererBase {
987 RendererBarsFillV(const _Getter1& getter1, const _Getter2& getter2, ImU32 col, double width) :
988 RendererBase(ImMin(getter1.Count, getter1.Count), 6, 4),
989 Getter1(getter1),
990 Getter2(getter2),
991 Col(col),
992 HalfWidth(width/2)
993 {}
994 void Init(ImDrawList& draw_list) const {
995 UV = draw_list._Data->TexUvWhitePixel;
996 }
997 IMPLOT_INLINE bool Render(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImRect& cull_rect, int prim) const {
998 ImPlotPoint p1 = Getter1(prim);
999 ImPlotPoint p2 = Getter2(prim);
1000 p1.x += HalfWidth;
1001 p2.x -= HalfWidth;
1002 ImVec2 P1 = this->Transformer(p1);
1003 ImVec2 P2 = this->Transformer(p2);
1004 float width_px = ImAbs(P1.x-P2.x);
1005 if (width_px < 1.0f) {
1006 P1.x += P1.x > P2.x ? (1-width_px) / 2 : (width_px-1) / 2;
1007 P2.x += P2.x > P1.x ? (1-width_px) / 2 : (width_px-1) / 2;
1008 }
1009 ImVec2 PMin = ImMin(P1, P2);
1010 ImVec2 PMax = ImMax(P1, P2);
1011 if (!cull_rect.Overlaps(ImRect(PMin, PMax)))
1012 return false;
1013 PrimRectFill(draw_list,PMin,PMax,Col,UV);
1014 return true;
1015 }
1016 const _Getter1& Getter1;
1017 const _Getter2& Getter2;
1018 const ImU32 Col;
1019 const double HalfWidth;
1020 mutable ImVec2 UV;
1021};
1022
1023template <class _Getter1, class _Getter2>
1024struct RendererBarsFillH : RendererBase {
1025 RendererBarsFillH(const _Getter1& getter1, const _Getter2& getter2, ImU32 col, double height) :
1026 RendererBase(ImMin(getter1.Count, getter1.Count), 6, 4),
1027 Getter1(getter1),
1028 Getter2(getter2),
1029 Col(col),
1030 HalfHeight(height/2)
1031 {}
1032 void Init(ImDrawList& draw_list) const {
1033 UV = draw_list._Data->TexUvWhitePixel;
1034 }
1035 IMPLOT_INLINE bool Render(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImRect& cull_rect, int prim) const {
1036 ImPlotPoint p1 = Getter1(prim);
1037 ImPlotPoint p2 = Getter2(prim);
1038 p1.y += HalfHeight;
1039 p2.y -= HalfHeight;
1040 ImVec2 P1 = this->Transformer(p1);
1041 ImVec2 P2 = this->Transformer(p2);
1042 float height_px = ImAbs(P1.y-P2.y);
1043 if (height_px < 1.0f) {
1044 P1.y += P1.y > P2.y ? (1-height_px) / 2 : (height_px-1) / 2;
1045 P2.y += P2.y > P1.y ? (1-height_px) / 2 : (height_px-1) / 2;
1046 }
1047 ImVec2 PMin = ImMin(P1, P2);
1048 ImVec2 PMax = ImMax(P1, P2);
1049 if (!cull_rect.Overlaps(ImRect(PMin, PMax)))
1050 return false;
1051 PrimRectFill(draw_list,PMin,PMax,Col,UV);
1052 return true;
1053 }
1054 const _Getter1& Getter1;
1055 const _Getter2& Getter2;
1056 const ImU32 Col;
1057 const double HalfHeight;
1058 mutable ImVec2 UV;
1059};
1060
1061template <class _Getter1, class _Getter2>
1062struct RendererBarsLineV : RendererBase {
1063 RendererBarsLineV(const _Getter1& getter1, const _Getter2& getter2, ImU32 col, double width, float weight) :
1064 RendererBase(ImMin(getter1.Count, getter1.Count), 24, 8),
1065 Getter1(getter1),
1066 Getter2(getter2),
1067 Col(col),
1068 HalfWidth(width/2),
1069 Weight(weight)
1070 {}
1071 void Init(ImDrawList& draw_list) const {
1072 UV = draw_list._Data->TexUvWhitePixel;
1073 }
1074 IMPLOT_INLINE bool Render(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImRect& cull_rect, int prim) const {
1075 ImPlotPoint p1 = Getter1(prim);
1076 ImPlotPoint p2 = Getter2(prim);
1077 p1.x += HalfWidth;
1078 p2.x -= HalfWidth;
1079 ImVec2 P1 = this->Transformer(p1);
1080 ImVec2 P2 = this->Transformer(p2);
1081 float width_px = ImAbs(P1.x-P2.x);
1082 if (width_px < 1.0f) {
1083 P1.x += P1.x > P2.x ? (1-width_px) / 2 : (width_px-1) / 2;
1084 P2.x += P2.x > P1.x ? (1-width_px) / 2 : (width_px-1) / 2;
1085 }
1086 ImVec2 PMin = ImMin(P1, P2);
1087 ImVec2 PMax = ImMax(P1, P2);
1088 if (!cull_rect.Overlaps(ImRect(PMin, PMax)))
1089 return false;
1090 PrimRectLine(draw_list,PMin,PMax,Weight,Col,UV);
1091 return true;
1092 }
1093 const _Getter1& Getter1;
1094 const _Getter2& Getter2;
1095 const ImU32 Col;
1096 const double HalfWidth;
1097 const float Weight;
1098 mutable ImVec2 UV;
1099};
1100
1101template <class _Getter1, class _Getter2>
1102struct RendererBarsLineH : RendererBase {
1103 RendererBarsLineH(const _Getter1& getter1, const _Getter2& getter2, ImU32 col, double height, float weight) :
1104 RendererBase(ImMin(getter1.Count, getter1.Count), 24, 8),
1105 Getter1(getter1),
1106 Getter2(getter2),
1107 Col(col),
1108 HalfHeight(height/2),
1109 Weight(weight)
1110 {}
1111 void Init(ImDrawList& draw_list) const {
1112 UV = draw_list._Data->TexUvWhitePixel;
1113 }
1114 IMPLOT_INLINE bool Render(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImRect& cull_rect, int prim) const {
1115 ImPlotPoint p1 = Getter1(prim);
1116 ImPlotPoint p2 = Getter2(prim);
1117 p1.y += HalfHeight;
1118 p2.y -= HalfHeight;
1119 ImVec2 P1 = this->Transformer(p1);
1120 ImVec2 P2 = this->Transformer(p2);
1121 float height_px = ImAbs(P1.y-P2.y);
1122 if (height_px < 1.0f) {
1123 P1.y += P1.y > P2.y ? (1-height_px) / 2 : (height_px-1) / 2;
1124 P2.y += P2.y > P1.y ? (1-height_px) / 2 : (height_px-1) / 2;
1125 }
1126 ImVec2 PMin = ImMin(P1, P2);
1127 ImVec2 PMax = ImMax(P1, P2);
1128 if (!cull_rect.Overlaps(ImRect(PMin, PMax)))
1129 return false;
1130 PrimRectLine(draw_list,PMin,PMax,Weight,Col,UV);
1131 return true;
1132 }
1133 const _Getter1& Getter1;
1134 const _Getter2& Getter2;
1135 const ImU32 Col;
1136 const double HalfHeight;
1137 const float Weight;
1138 mutable ImVec2 UV;
1139};
1140
1141
1142template <class _Getter>
1143struct RendererStairsPre : RendererBase {
1144 RendererStairsPre(const _Getter& getter, ImU32 col, float weight) :
1145 RendererBase(getter.Count - 1, 12, 8),
1146 Getter(getter),
1147 Col(col),
1148 HalfWeight(ImMax(1.0f,weight)*0.5f)
1149 {
1150 P1 = this->Transformer(Getter(0));
1151 }
1152 void Init(ImDrawList& draw_list) const {
1153 UV = draw_list._Data->TexUvWhitePixel;
1154 }
1155 IMPLOT_INLINE bool Render(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImRect& cull_rect, int prim) const {
1156 ImVec2 P2 = this->Transformer(Getter(prim + 1));
1157 if (!cull_rect.Overlaps(ImRect(ImMin(P1, P2), ImMax(P1, P2)))) {
1158 P1 = P2;
1159 return false;
1160 }
1161 PrimRectFill(draw_list, ImVec2(P1.x - HalfWeight, P1.y), ImVec2(P1.x + HalfWeight, P2.y), Col, UV);
1162 PrimRectFill(draw_list, ImVec2(P1.x, P2.y + HalfWeight), ImVec2(P2.x, P2.y - HalfWeight), Col, UV);
1163 P1 = P2;
1164 return true;
1165 }
1166 const _Getter& Getter;
1167 const ImU32 Col;
1168 mutable float HalfWeight;
1169 mutable ImVec2 P1;
1170 mutable ImVec2 UV;
1171};
1172
1173template <class _Getter>
1174struct RendererStairsPost : RendererBase {
1175 RendererStairsPost(const _Getter& getter, ImU32 col, float weight) :
1176 RendererBase(getter.Count - 1, 12, 8),
1177 Getter(getter),
1178 Col(col),
1179 HalfWeight(ImMax(1.0f,weight) * 0.5f)
1180 {
1181 P1 = this->Transformer(Getter(0));
1182 }
1183 void Init(ImDrawList& draw_list) const {
1184 UV = draw_list._Data->TexUvWhitePixel;
1185 }
1186 IMPLOT_INLINE bool Render(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImRect& cull_rect, int prim) const {
1187 ImVec2 P2 = this->Transformer(Getter(prim + 1));
1188 if (!cull_rect.Overlaps(ImRect(ImMin(P1, P2), ImMax(P1, P2)))) {
1189 P1 = P2;
1190 return false;
1191 }
1192 PrimRectFill(draw_list, ImVec2(P1.x, P1.y + HalfWeight), ImVec2(P2.x, P1.y - HalfWeight), Col, UV);
1193 PrimRectFill(draw_list, ImVec2(P2.x - HalfWeight, P2.y), ImVec2(P2.x + HalfWeight, P1.y), Col, UV);
1194 P1 = P2;
1195 return true;
1196 }
1197 const _Getter& Getter;
1198 const ImU32 Col;
1199 mutable float HalfWeight;
1200 mutable ImVec2 P1;
1201 mutable ImVec2 UV;
1202};
1203
1204template <class _Getter>
1205struct RendererStairsPreShaded : RendererBase {
1206 RendererStairsPreShaded(const _Getter& getter, ImU32 col) :
1207 RendererBase(getter.Count - 1, 6, 4),
1208 Getter(getter),
1209 Col(col)
1210 {
1211 P1 = this->Transformer(Getter(0));
1212 Y0 = this->Transformer(ImPlotPoint(0,0)).y;
1213 }
1214 void Init(ImDrawList& draw_list) const {
1215 UV = draw_list._Data->TexUvWhitePixel;
1216 }
1217 IMPLOT_INLINE bool Render(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImRect& cull_rect, int prim) const {
1218 ImVec2 P2 = this->Transformer(Getter(prim + 1));
1219 ImVec2 PMin(ImMin(P1.x, P2.x), ImMin(Y0, P2.y));
1220 ImVec2 PMax(ImMax(P1.x, P2.x), ImMax(Y0, P2.y));
1221 if (!cull_rect.Overlaps(ImRect(PMin, PMax))) {
1222 P1 = P2;
1223 return false;
1224 }
1225 PrimRectFill(draw_list, PMin, PMax, Col, UV);
1226 P1 = P2;
1227 return true;
1228 }
1229 const _Getter& Getter;
1230 const ImU32 Col;
1231 float Y0;
1232 mutable ImVec2 P1;
1233 mutable ImVec2 UV;
1234};
1235
1236template <class _Getter>
1237struct RendererStairsPostShaded : RendererBase {
1238 RendererStairsPostShaded(const _Getter& getter, ImU32 col) :
1239 RendererBase(getter.Count - 1, 6, 4),
1240 Getter(getter),
1241 Col(col)
1242 {
1243 P1 = this->Transformer(Getter(0));
1244 Y0 = this->Transformer(ImPlotPoint(0,0)).y;
1245 }
1246 void Init(ImDrawList& draw_list) const {
1247 UV = draw_list._Data->TexUvWhitePixel;
1248 }
1249 IMPLOT_INLINE bool Render(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImRect& cull_rect, int prim) const {
1250 ImVec2 P2 = this->Transformer(Getter(prim + 1));
1251 ImVec2 PMin(ImMin(P1.x, P2.x), ImMin(P1.y, Y0));
1252 ImVec2 PMax(ImMax(P1.x, P2.x), ImMax(P1.y, Y0));
1253 if (!cull_rect.Overlaps(ImRect(PMin, PMax))) {
1254 P1 = P2;
1255 return false;
1256 }
1257 PrimRectFill(draw_list, PMin, PMax, Col, UV);
1258 P1 = P2;
1259 return true;
1260 }
1261 const _Getter& Getter;
1262 const ImU32 Col;
1263 float Y0;
1264 mutable ImVec2 P1;
1265 mutable ImVec2 UV;
1266};
1267
1268
1269
1270template <class _Getter1, class _Getter2>
1271struct RendererShaded : RendererBase {
1272 RendererShaded(const _Getter1& getter1, const _Getter2& getter2, ImU32 col) :
1273 RendererBase(ImMin(getter1.Count, getter2.Count) - 1, 6, 5),
1274 Getter1(getter1),
1275 Getter2(getter2),
1276 Col(col)
1277 {
1278 P11 = this->Transformer(Getter1(0));
1279 P12 = this->Transformer(Getter2(0));
1280 }
1281 void Init(ImDrawList& draw_list) const {
1282 UV = draw_list._Data->TexUvWhitePixel;
1283 }
1284 IMPLOT_INLINE bool Render(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImRect& cull_rect, int prim) const {
1285 ImVec2 P21 = this->Transformer(Getter1(prim+1));
1286 ImVec2 P22 = this->Transformer(Getter2(prim+1));
1287 ImRect rect(ImMin(ImMin(ImMin(P11,P12),P21),P22), ImMax(ImMax(ImMax(P11,P12),P21),P22));
1288 if (!cull_rect.Overlaps(rect)) {
1289 P11 = P21;
1290 P12 = P22;
1291 return false;
1292 }
1293 const int intersect = (P11.y > P12.y && P22.y > P21.y) || (P12.y > P11.y && P21.y > P22.y);
1294 const ImVec2 intersection = intersect == 0 ? ImVec2(0,0) : Intersection(P11,P21,P12,P22);
1295 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].pos = P11;
1296 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].uv = UV;
1297 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].col = Col;
1298 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[1].pos = P21;
1299 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[1].uv = UV;
1300 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[1].col = Col;
1301 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[2].pos = intersection;
1302 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[2].uv = UV;
1303 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[2].col = Col;
1304 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[3].pos = P12;
1305 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[3].uv = UV;
1306 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[3].col = Col;
1307 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[4].pos = P22;
1308 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[4].uv = UV;
1309 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[4].col = Col;
1310 draw_list._VtxWritePtr += 5;
1311 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[0] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx);
1312 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[1] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 1 + intersect);
1313 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[2] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 3);
1314 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[3] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 1);
1315 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[4] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 4);
1316 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[5] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + 3 - intersect);
1317 draw_list._IdxWritePtr += 6;
1318 draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx += 5;
1319 P11 = P21;
1320 P12 = P22;
1321 return true;
1322 }
1323 const _Getter1& Getter1;
1324 const _Getter2& Getter2;
1325 const ImU32 Col;
1326 mutable ImVec2 P11;
1327 mutable ImVec2 P12;
1328 mutable ImVec2 UV;
1329};
1330
1331struct RectC {
1332 ImPlotPoint Pos;
1333 ImPlotPoint HalfSize;
1334 ImU32 Color;
1335};
1336
1337template <typename _Getter>
1338struct RendererRectC : RendererBase {
1339 RendererRectC(const _Getter& getter) :
1340 RendererBase(getter.Count, 6, 4),
1341 Getter(getter)
1342 {}
1343 void Init(ImDrawList& draw_list) const {
1344 UV = draw_list._Data->TexUvWhitePixel;
1345 }
1346 IMPLOT_INLINE bool Render(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImRect& cull_rect, int prim) const {
1347 RectC rect = Getter(prim);
1348 ImVec2 P1 = this->Transformer(rect.Pos.x - rect.HalfSize.x , rect.Pos.y - rect.HalfSize.y);
1349 ImVec2 P2 = this->Transformer(rect.Pos.x + rect.HalfSize.x , rect.Pos.y + rect.HalfSize.y);
1350 if ((rect.Color & IM_COL32_A_MASK) == 0 || !cull_rect.Overlaps(ImRect(ImMin(P1, P2), ImMax(P1, P2))))
1351 return false;
1352 PrimRectFill(draw_list,P1,P2,rect.Color,UV);
1353 return true;
1354 }
1355 const _Getter& Getter;
1356 mutable ImVec2 UV;
1357};
1358
1359//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1360// [SECTION] RenderPrimitives
1361//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1362
1364template <class _Renderer>
1365void RenderPrimitivesEx(const _Renderer& renderer, ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImRect& cull_rect) {
1366 unsigned int prims = renderer.Prims;
1367 unsigned int prims_culled = 0;
1368 unsigned int idx = 0;
1369 renderer.Init(draw_list);
1370 while (prims) {
1371 // find how many can be reserved up to end of current draw command's limit
1372 unsigned int cnt = ImMin(prims, (MaxIdx<ImDrawIdx>::Value - draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx) / renderer.VtxConsumed);
1373 // make sure at least this many elements can be rendered to avoid situations where at the end of buffer this slow path is not taken all the time
1374 if (cnt >= ImMin(64u, prims)) {
1375 if (prims_culled >= cnt)
1376 prims_culled -= cnt; // reuse previous reservation
1377 else {
1378 // add more elements to previous reservation
1379 draw_list.PrimReserve((cnt - prims_culled) * renderer.IdxConsumed, (cnt - prims_culled) * renderer.VtxConsumed);
1380 prims_culled = 0;
1381 }
1382 }
1383 else
1384 {
1385 if (prims_culled > 0) {
1386 draw_list.PrimUnreserve(prims_culled * renderer.IdxConsumed, prims_culled * renderer.VtxConsumed);
1387 prims_culled = 0;
1388 }
1389 cnt = ImMin(prims, (MaxIdx<ImDrawIdx>::Value - 0/*draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx*/) / renderer.VtxConsumed);
1390 // reserve new draw command
1391 draw_list.PrimReserve(cnt * renderer.IdxConsumed, cnt * renderer.VtxConsumed);
1392 }
1393 prims -= cnt;
1394 for (unsigned int ie = idx + cnt; idx != ie; ++idx) {
1395 if (!renderer.Render(draw_list, cull_rect, idx))
1396 prims_culled++;
1397 }
1398 }
1399 if (prims_culled > 0)
1400 draw_list.PrimUnreserve(prims_culled * renderer.IdxConsumed, prims_culled * renderer.VtxConsumed);
1401}
1402
1403template <template <class> class _Renderer, class _Getter, typename ...Args>
1404void RenderPrimitives1(const _Getter& getter, Args... args) {
1405 ImDrawList& draw_list = *GetPlotDrawList();
1406 const ImRect& cull_rect = GetCurrentPlot()->PlotRect;
1407 RenderPrimitivesEx(_Renderer<_Getter>(getter,args...), draw_list, cull_rect);
1408}
1409
1410template <template <class,class> class _Renderer, class _Getter1, class _Getter2, typename ...Args>
1411void RenderPrimitives2(const _Getter1& getter1, const _Getter2& getter2, Args... args) {
1412 ImDrawList& draw_list = *GetPlotDrawList();
1413 const ImRect& cull_rect = GetCurrentPlot()->PlotRect;
1414 RenderPrimitivesEx(_Renderer<_Getter1,_Getter2>(getter1,getter2,args...), draw_list, cull_rect);
1415}
1416
1417//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1418// [SECTION] Markers
1419//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1420
1421template <class _Getter>
1422struct RendererMarkersFill : RendererBase {
1423 RendererMarkersFill(const _Getter& getter, const ImVec2* marker, int count, float size, ImU32 col) :
1424 RendererBase(getter.Count, (count-2)*3, count),
1425 Getter(getter),
1426 Marker(marker),
1427 Count(count),
1428 Size(size),
1429 Col(col)
1430 { }
1431 void Init(ImDrawList& draw_list) const {
1432 UV = draw_list._Data->TexUvWhitePixel;
1433 }
1434 IMPLOT_INLINE bool Render(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImRect& cull_rect, int prim) const {
1435 ImVec2 p = this->Transformer(Getter(prim));
1436 if (p.x >= cull_rect.Min.x && p.y >= cull_rect.Min.y && p.x <= cull_rect.Max.x && p.y <= cull_rect.Max.y) {
1437 for (int i = 0; i < Count; i++) {
1438 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].pos.x = p.x + Marker[i].x * Size;
1439 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].pos.y = p.y + Marker[i].y * Size;
1440 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].uv = UV;
1441 draw_list._VtxWritePtr[0].col = Col;
1442 draw_list._VtxWritePtr++;
1443 }
1444 for (int i = 2; i < Count; i++) {
1445 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[0] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx);
1446 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[1] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + i - 1);
1447 draw_list._IdxWritePtr[2] = (ImDrawIdx)(draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx + i);
1448 draw_list._IdxWritePtr += 3;
1449 }
1450 draw_list._VtxCurrentIdx += (ImDrawIdx)Count;
1451 return true;
1452 }
1453 return false;
1454 }
1455 const _Getter& Getter;
1456 const ImVec2* Marker;
1457 const int Count;
1458 const float Size;
1459 const ImU32 Col;
1460 mutable ImVec2 UV;
1461};
1462
1463
1464template <class _Getter>
1465struct RendererMarkersLine : RendererBase {
1466 RendererMarkersLine(const _Getter& getter, const ImVec2* marker, int count, float size, float weight, ImU32 col) :
1467 RendererBase(getter.Count, count/2*6, count/2*4),
1468 Getter(getter),
1469 Marker(marker),
1470 Count(count),
1471 HalfWeight(ImMax(1.0f,weight)*0.5f),
1472 Size(size),
1473 Col(col)
1474 { }
1475 void Init(ImDrawList& draw_list) const {
1476 GetLineRenderProps(draw_list, HalfWeight, UV0, UV1);
1477 }
1478 IMPLOT_INLINE bool Render(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImRect& cull_rect, int prim) const {
1479 ImVec2 p = this->Transformer(Getter(prim));
1480 if (p.x >= cull_rect.Min.x && p.y >= cull_rect.Min.y && p.x <= cull_rect.Max.x && p.y <= cull_rect.Max.y) {
1481 for (int i = 0; i < Count; i = i + 2) {
1482 ImVec2 p1(p.x + Marker[i].x * Size, p.y + Marker[i].y * Size);
1483 ImVec2 p2(p.x + Marker[i+1].x * Size, p.y + Marker[i+1].y * Size);
1484 PrimLine(draw_list, p1, p2, HalfWeight, Col, UV0, UV1);
1485 }
1486 return true;
1487 }
1488 return false;
1489 }
1490 const _Getter& Getter;
1491 const ImVec2* Marker;
1492 const int Count;
1493 mutable float HalfWeight;
1494 const float Size;
1495 const ImU32 Col;
1496 mutable ImVec2 UV0;
1497 mutable ImVec2 UV1;
1498};
1499
1500static const ImVec2 MARKER_FILL_CIRCLE[10] = {ImVec2(1.0f, 0.0f), ImVec2(0.809017f, 0.58778524f),ImVec2(0.30901697f, 0.95105654f),ImVec2(-0.30901703f, 0.9510565f),ImVec2(-0.80901706f, 0.5877852f),ImVec2(-1.0f, 0.0f),ImVec2(-0.80901694f, -0.58778536f),ImVec2(-0.3090171f, -0.9510565f),ImVec2(0.30901712f, -0.9510565f),ImVec2(0.80901694f, -0.5877853f)};
1501static const ImVec2 MARKER_FILL_SQUARE[4] = {ImVec2(SQRT_1_2,SQRT_1_2), ImVec2(SQRT_1_2,-SQRT_1_2), ImVec2(-SQRT_1_2,-SQRT_1_2), ImVec2(-SQRT_1_2,SQRT_1_2)};
1502static const ImVec2 MARKER_FILL_DIAMOND[4] = {ImVec2(1, 0), ImVec2(0, -1), ImVec2(-1, 0), ImVec2(0, 1)};
1503static const ImVec2 MARKER_FILL_UP[3] = {ImVec2(SQRT_3_2,0.5f),ImVec2(0,-1),ImVec2(-SQRT_3_2,0.5f)};
1504static const ImVec2 MARKER_FILL_DOWN[3] = {ImVec2(SQRT_3_2,-0.5f),ImVec2(0,1),ImVec2(-SQRT_3_2,-0.5f)};
1505static const ImVec2 MARKER_FILL_LEFT[3] = {ImVec2(-1,0), ImVec2(0.5, SQRT_3_2), ImVec2(0.5, -SQRT_3_2)};
1506static const ImVec2 MARKER_FILL_RIGHT[3] = {ImVec2(1,0), ImVec2(-0.5, SQRT_3_2), ImVec2(-0.5, -SQRT_3_2)};
1507
1508static const ImVec2 MARKER_LINE_CIRCLE[20] = {
1509 ImVec2(1.0f, 0.0f),
1510 ImVec2(0.809017f, 0.58778524f),
1511 ImVec2(0.809017f, 0.58778524f),
1512 ImVec2(0.30901697f, 0.95105654f),
1513 ImVec2(0.30901697f, 0.95105654f),
1514 ImVec2(-0.30901703f, 0.9510565f),
1515 ImVec2(-0.30901703f, 0.9510565f),
1516 ImVec2(-0.80901706f, 0.5877852f),
1517 ImVec2(-0.80901706f, 0.5877852f),
1518 ImVec2(-1.0f, 0.0f),
1519 ImVec2(-1.0f, 0.0f),
1520 ImVec2(-0.80901694f, -0.58778536f),
1521 ImVec2(-0.80901694f, -0.58778536f),
1522 ImVec2(-0.3090171f, -0.9510565f),
1523 ImVec2(-0.3090171f, -0.9510565f),
1524 ImVec2(0.30901712f, -0.9510565f),
1525 ImVec2(0.30901712f, -0.9510565f),
1526 ImVec2(0.80901694f, -0.5877853f),
1527 ImVec2(0.80901694f, -0.5877853f),
1528 ImVec2(1.0f, 0.0f)
1529};
1530static const ImVec2 MARKER_LINE_SQUARE[8] = {ImVec2(SQRT_1_2,SQRT_1_2), ImVec2(SQRT_1_2,-SQRT_1_2), ImVec2(SQRT_1_2,-SQRT_1_2), ImVec2(-SQRT_1_2,-SQRT_1_2), ImVec2(-SQRT_1_2,-SQRT_1_2), ImVec2(-SQRT_1_2,SQRT_1_2), ImVec2(-SQRT_1_2,SQRT_1_2), ImVec2(SQRT_1_2,SQRT_1_2)};
1531static const ImVec2 MARKER_LINE_DIAMOND[8] = {ImVec2(1, 0), ImVec2(0, -1), ImVec2(0, -1), ImVec2(-1, 0), ImVec2(-1, 0), ImVec2(0, 1), ImVec2(0, 1), ImVec2(1, 0)};
1532static const ImVec2 MARKER_LINE_UP[6] = {ImVec2(SQRT_3_2,0.5f), ImVec2(0,-1),ImVec2(0,-1),ImVec2(-SQRT_3_2,0.5f),ImVec2(-SQRT_3_2,0.5f),ImVec2(SQRT_3_2,0.5f)};
1533static const ImVec2 MARKER_LINE_DOWN[6] = {ImVec2(SQRT_3_2,-0.5f),ImVec2(0,1),ImVec2(0,1),ImVec2(-SQRT_3_2,-0.5f), ImVec2(-SQRT_3_2,-0.5f), ImVec2(SQRT_3_2,-0.5f)};
1534static const ImVec2 MARKER_LINE_LEFT[6] = {ImVec2(-1,0), ImVec2(0.5, SQRT_3_2), ImVec2(0.5, SQRT_3_2), ImVec2(0.5, -SQRT_3_2) , ImVec2(0.5, -SQRT_3_2) , ImVec2(-1,0) };
1535static const ImVec2 MARKER_LINE_RIGHT[6] = {ImVec2(1,0), ImVec2(-0.5, SQRT_3_2), ImVec2(-0.5, SQRT_3_2), ImVec2(-0.5, -SQRT_3_2), ImVec2(-0.5, -SQRT_3_2), ImVec2(1,0) };
1536static const ImVec2 MARKER_LINE_ASTERISK[6] = {ImVec2(-SQRT_3_2, -0.5f), ImVec2(SQRT_3_2, 0.5f), ImVec2(-SQRT_3_2, 0.5f), ImVec2(SQRT_3_2, -0.5f), ImVec2(0, -1), ImVec2(0, 1)};
1537static const ImVec2 MARKER_LINE_PLUS[4] = {ImVec2(-1, 0), ImVec2(1, 0), ImVec2(0, -1), ImVec2(0, 1)};
1538static const ImVec2 MARKER_LINE_CROSS[4] = {ImVec2(-SQRT_1_2,-SQRT_1_2),ImVec2(SQRT_1_2,SQRT_1_2),ImVec2(SQRT_1_2,-SQRT_1_2),ImVec2(-SQRT_1_2,SQRT_1_2)};
1539
1540template <typename _Getter>
1541void RenderMarkers(const _Getter& getter, ImPlotMarker marker, float size, bool rend_fill, ImU32 col_fill, bool rend_line, ImU32 col_line, float weight) {
1542 if (rend_fill) {
1543 switch (marker) {
1544 case ImPlotMarker_Circle : RenderPrimitives1<RendererMarkersFill>(getter,MARKER_FILL_CIRCLE,10,size,col_fill); break;
1545 case ImPlotMarker_Square : RenderPrimitives1<RendererMarkersFill>(getter,MARKER_FILL_SQUARE, 4,size,col_fill); break;
1546 case ImPlotMarker_Diamond : RenderPrimitives1<RendererMarkersFill>(getter,MARKER_FILL_DIAMOND,4,size,col_fill); break;
1547 case ImPlotMarker_Up : RenderPrimitives1<RendererMarkersFill>(getter,MARKER_FILL_UP, 3,size,col_fill); break;
1548 case ImPlotMarker_Down : RenderPrimitives1<RendererMarkersFill>(getter,MARKER_FILL_DOWN, 3,size,col_fill); break;
1549 case ImPlotMarker_Left : RenderPrimitives1<RendererMarkersFill>(getter,MARKER_FILL_LEFT, 3,size,col_fill); break;
1550 case ImPlotMarker_Right : RenderPrimitives1<RendererMarkersFill>(getter,MARKER_FILL_RIGHT, 3,size,col_fill); break;
1551 }
1552 }
1553 if (rend_line) {
1554 switch (marker) {
1555 case ImPlotMarker_Circle : RenderPrimitives1<RendererMarkersLine>(getter,MARKER_LINE_CIRCLE, 20,size,weight,col_line); break;
1556 case ImPlotMarker_Square : RenderPrimitives1<RendererMarkersLine>(getter,MARKER_LINE_SQUARE, 8,size,weight,col_line); break;
1557 case ImPlotMarker_Diamond : RenderPrimitives1<RendererMarkersLine>(getter,MARKER_LINE_DIAMOND, 8,size,weight,col_line); break;
1558 case ImPlotMarker_Up : RenderPrimitives1<RendererMarkersLine>(getter,MARKER_LINE_UP, 6,size,weight,col_line); break;
1559 case ImPlotMarker_Down : RenderPrimitives1<RendererMarkersLine>(getter,MARKER_LINE_DOWN, 6,size,weight,col_line); break;
1560 case ImPlotMarker_Left : RenderPrimitives1<RendererMarkersLine>(getter,MARKER_LINE_LEFT, 6,size,weight,col_line); break;
1561 case ImPlotMarker_Right : RenderPrimitives1<RendererMarkersLine>(getter,MARKER_LINE_RIGHT, 6,size,weight,col_line); break;
1562 case ImPlotMarker_Asterisk : RenderPrimitives1<RendererMarkersLine>(getter,MARKER_LINE_ASTERISK,6,size,weight,col_line); break;
1563 case ImPlotMarker_Plus : RenderPrimitives1<RendererMarkersLine>(getter,MARKER_LINE_PLUS, 4,size,weight,col_line); break;
1564 case ImPlotMarker_Cross : RenderPrimitives1<RendererMarkersLine>(getter,MARKER_LINE_CROSS, 4,size,weight,col_line); break;
1565 }
1566 }
1567}
1568
1569//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1570// [SECTION] PlotLine
1571//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1572
1573template <typename _Getter>
1574void PlotLineEx(const char* label_id, const _Getter& getter, ImPlotLineFlags flags) {
1575 if (BeginItemEx(label_id, Fitter1<_Getter>(getter), flags, ImPlotCol_Line)) {
1576 if (getter.Count <= 0) {
1577 EndItem();
1578 return;
1579 }
1580 const ImPlotNextItemData& s = GetItemData();
1581 if (getter.Count > 1) {
1582 if (ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotLineFlags_Shaded) && s.RenderFill) {
1583 const ImU32 col_fill = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Fill]);
1584 GetterOverrideY<_Getter> getter2(getter, 0);
1585 RenderPrimitives2<RendererShaded>(getter,getter2,col_fill);
1586 }
1587 if (s.RenderLine) {
1588 const ImU32 col_line = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Line]);
1589 if (ImHasFlag(flags,ImPlotLineFlags_Segments)) {
1590 RenderPrimitives1<RendererLineSegments1>(getter,col_line,s.LineWeight);
1591 }
1592 else if (ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotLineFlags_Loop)) {
1593 if (ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotLineFlags_SkipNaN))
1594 RenderPrimitives1<RendererLineStripSkip>(GetterLoop<_Getter>(getter),col_line,s.LineWeight);
1595 else
1596 RenderPrimitives1<RendererLineStrip>(GetterLoop<_Getter>(getter),col_line,s.LineWeight);
1597 }
1598 else {
1599 if (ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotLineFlags_SkipNaN))
1600 RenderPrimitives1<RendererLineStripSkip>(getter,col_line,s.LineWeight);
1601 else
1602 RenderPrimitives1<RendererLineStrip>(getter,col_line,s.LineWeight);
1603 }
1604 }
1605 }
1606 // render markers
1607 if (s.Marker != ImPlotMarker_None) {
1608 if (ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotLineFlags_NoClip)) {
1609 PopPlotClipRect();
1610 PushPlotClipRect(s.MarkerSize);
1611 }
1612 const ImU32 col_line = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerOutline]);
1613 const ImU32 col_fill = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerFill]);
1614 RenderMarkers<_Getter>(getter, s.Marker, s.MarkerSize, s.RenderMarkerFill, col_fill, s.RenderMarkerLine, col_line, s.MarkerWeight);
1615 }
1616 EndItem();
1617 }
1618}
1619
1620template <typename T>
1621void PlotLine(const char* label_id, const T* values, int count, double xscale, double x0, ImPlotLineFlags flags, int offset, int stride) {
1622 GetterXY<IndexerLin,IndexerIdx<T>> getter(IndexerLin(xscale,x0),IndexerIdx<T>(values,count,offset,stride),count);
1623 PlotLineEx(label_id, getter, flags);
1624}
1625
1626template <typename T>
1627void PlotLine(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, int count, ImPlotLineFlags flags, int offset, int stride) {
1628 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>> getter(IndexerIdx<T>(xs,count,offset,stride),IndexerIdx<T>(ys,count,offset,stride),count);
1629 PlotLineEx(label_id, getter, flags);
1630}
1631
1632#define INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T) \
1633 template IMPLOT_API void PlotLine<T> (const char* label_id, const T* values, int count, double xscale, double x0, ImPlotLineFlags flags, int offset, int stride); \
1634 template IMPLOT_API void PlotLine<T>(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, int count, ImPlotLineFlags flags, int offset, int stride);
1635CALL_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES()
1636#undef INSTANTIATE_MACRO
1637
1638// custom
1639void PlotLineG(const char* label_id, ImPlotGetter getter_func, void* data, int count, ImPlotLineFlags flags) {
1640 GetterFuncPtr getter(getter_func,data, count);
1641 PlotLineEx(label_id, getter, flags);
1642}
1643
1644//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1645// [SECTION] PlotScatter
1646//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1647
1648template <typename Getter>
1649void PlotScatterEx(const char* label_id, const Getter& getter, ImPlotScatterFlags flags) {
1650 if (BeginItemEx(label_id, Fitter1<Getter>(getter), flags, ImPlotCol_MarkerOutline)) {
1651 if (getter.Count <= 0) {
1652 EndItem();
1653 return;
1654 }
1655 const ImPlotNextItemData& s = GetItemData();
1656 ImPlotMarker marker = s.Marker == ImPlotMarker_None ? ImPlotMarker_Circle: s.Marker;
1657 if (marker != ImPlotMarker_None) {
1658 if (ImHasFlag(flags,ImPlotScatterFlags_NoClip)) {
1659 PopPlotClipRect();
1660 PushPlotClipRect(s.MarkerSize);
1661 }
1662 const ImU32 col_line = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerOutline]);
1663 const ImU32 col_fill = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerFill]);
1664 RenderMarkers<Getter>(getter, marker, s.MarkerSize, s.RenderMarkerFill, col_fill, s.RenderMarkerLine, col_line, s.MarkerWeight);
1665 }
1666 EndItem();
1667 }
1668}
1669
1670template <typename T>
1671void PlotScatter(const char* label_id, const T* values, int count, double xscale, double x0, ImPlotScatterFlags flags, int offset, int stride) {
1672 GetterXY<IndexerLin,IndexerIdx<T>> getter(IndexerLin(xscale,x0),IndexerIdx<T>(values,count,offset,stride),count);
1673 PlotScatterEx(label_id, getter, flags);
1674}
1675
1676template <typename T>
1677void PlotScatter(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, int count, ImPlotScatterFlags flags, int offset, int stride) {
1678 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>> getter(IndexerIdx<T>(xs,count,offset,stride),IndexerIdx<T>(ys,count,offset,stride),count);
1679 return PlotScatterEx(label_id, getter, flags);
1680}
1681
1682#define INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T) \
1683 template IMPLOT_API void PlotScatter<T>(const char* label_id, const T* values, int count, double xscale, double x0, ImPlotScatterFlags flags, int offset, int stride); \
1684 template IMPLOT_API void PlotScatter<T>(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, int count, ImPlotScatterFlags flags, int offset, int stride);
1685CALL_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES()
1686#undef INSTANTIATE_MACRO
1687
1688// custom
1689void PlotScatterG(const char* label_id, ImPlotGetter getter_func, void* data, int count, ImPlotScatterFlags flags) {
1690 GetterFuncPtr getter(getter_func,data, count);
1691 return PlotScatterEx(label_id, getter, flags);
1692}
1693
1694//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1695// [SECTION] PlotStairs
1696//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1697
1698template <typename Getter>
1699void PlotStairsEx(const char* label_id, const Getter& getter, ImPlotStairsFlags flags) {
1700 if (BeginItemEx(label_id, Fitter1<Getter>(getter), flags, ImPlotCol_Line)) {
1701 if (getter.Count <= 0) {
1702 EndItem();
1703 return;
1704 }
1705 const ImPlotNextItemData& s = GetItemData();
1706 if (getter.Count > 1) {
1707 if (s.RenderFill && ImHasFlag(flags,ImPlotStairsFlags_Shaded)) {
1708 const ImU32 col_fill = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Fill]);
1709 if (ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotStairsFlags_PreStep))
1710 RenderPrimitives1<RendererStairsPreShaded>(getter,col_fill);
1711 else
1712 RenderPrimitives1<RendererStairsPostShaded>(getter,col_fill);
1713 }
1714 if (s.RenderLine) {
1715 const ImU32 col_line = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Line]);
1716 if (ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotStairsFlags_PreStep))
1717 RenderPrimitives1<RendererStairsPre>(getter,col_line,s.LineWeight);
1718 else
1719 RenderPrimitives1<RendererStairsPost>(getter,col_line,s.LineWeight);
1720 }
1721 }
1722 // render markers
1723 if (s.Marker != ImPlotMarker_None) {
1724 PopPlotClipRect();
1725 PushPlotClipRect(s.MarkerSize);
1726 const ImU32 col_line = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerOutline]);
1727 const ImU32 col_fill = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerFill]);
1728 RenderMarkers<Getter>(getter, s.Marker, s.MarkerSize, s.RenderMarkerFill, col_fill, s.RenderMarkerLine, col_line, s.MarkerWeight);
1729 }
1730 EndItem();
1731 }
1732}
1733
1734template <typename T>
1735void PlotStairs(const char* label_id, const T* values, int count, double xscale, double x0, ImPlotStairsFlags flags, int offset, int stride) {
1736 GetterXY<IndexerLin,IndexerIdx<T>> getter(IndexerLin(xscale,x0),IndexerIdx<T>(values,count,offset,stride),count);
1737 PlotStairsEx(label_id, getter, flags);
1738}
1739
1740template <typename T>
1741void PlotStairs(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, int count, ImPlotStairsFlags flags, int offset, int stride) {
1742 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>> getter(IndexerIdx<T>(xs,count,offset,stride),IndexerIdx<T>(ys,count,offset,stride),count);
1743 return PlotStairsEx(label_id, getter, flags);
1744}
1745
1746#define INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T) \
1747 template IMPLOT_API void PlotStairs<T> (const char* label_id, const T* values, int count, double xscale, double x0, ImPlotStairsFlags flags, int offset, int stride); \
1748 template IMPLOT_API void PlotStairs<T>(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, int count, ImPlotStairsFlags flags, int offset, int stride);
1749CALL_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES()
1750#undef INSTANTIATE_MACRO
1751
1752// custom
1753void PlotStairsG(const char* label_id, ImPlotGetter getter_func, void* data, int count, ImPlotStairsFlags flags) {
1754 GetterFuncPtr getter(getter_func,data, count);
1755 return PlotStairsEx(label_id, getter, flags);
1756}
1757
1758//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1759// [SECTION] PlotShaded
1760//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1761
1762template <typename Getter1, typename Getter2>
1763void PlotShadedEx(const char* label_id, const Getter1& getter1, const Getter2& getter2, ImPlotShadedFlags flags) {
1764 if (BeginItemEx(label_id, Fitter2<Getter1,Getter2>(getter1,getter2), flags, ImPlotCol_Fill)) {
1765 if (getter1.Count <= 0 || getter2.Count <= 0) {
1766 EndItem();
1767 return;
1768 }
1769 const ImPlotNextItemData& s = GetItemData();
1770 if (s.RenderFill) {
1771 const ImU32 col = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Fill]);
1772 RenderPrimitives2<RendererShaded>(getter1,getter2,col);
1773 }
1774 EndItem();
1775 }
1776}
1777
1778template <typename T>
1779void PlotShaded(const char* label_id, const T* values, int count, double y_ref, double xscale, double x0, ImPlotShadedFlags flags, int offset, int stride) {
1780 if (!(y_ref > -DBL_MAX))
1781 y_ref = GetPlotLimits(IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO).Y.Min;
1782 if (!(y_ref < DBL_MAX))
1783 y_ref = GetPlotLimits(IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO).Y.Max;
1784 GetterXY<IndexerLin,IndexerIdx<T>> getter1(IndexerLin(xscale,x0),IndexerIdx<T>(values,count,offset,stride),count);
1785 GetterXY<IndexerLin,IndexerConst> getter2(IndexerLin(xscale,x0),IndexerConst(y_ref),count);
1786 PlotShadedEx(label_id, getter1, getter2, flags);
1787}
1788
1789template <typename T>
1790void PlotShaded(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, int count, double y_ref, ImPlotShadedFlags flags, int offset, int stride) {
1791 if (y_ref == -HUGE_VAL)
1792 y_ref = GetPlotLimits(IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO).Y.Min;
1793 if (y_ref == HUGE_VAL)
1794 y_ref = GetPlotLimits(IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO).Y.Max;
1795 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>> getter1(IndexerIdx<T>(xs,count,offset,stride),IndexerIdx<T>(ys,count,offset,stride),count);
1796 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerConst> getter2(IndexerIdx<T>(xs,count,offset,stride),IndexerConst(y_ref),count);
1797 PlotShadedEx(label_id, getter1, getter2, flags);
1798}
1799
1800
1801template <typename T>
1802void PlotShaded(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys1, const T* ys2, int count, ImPlotShadedFlags flags, int offset, int stride) {
1803 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>> getter1(IndexerIdx<T>(xs,count,offset,stride),IndexerIdx<T>(ys1,count,offset,stride),count);
1804 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>> getter2(IndexerIdx<T>(xs,count,offset,stride),IndexerIdx<T>(ys2,count,offset,stride),count);
1805 PlotShadedEx(label_id, getter1, getter2, flags);
1806}
1807
1808#define INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T) \
1809 template IMPLOT_API void PlotShaded<T>(const char* label_id, const T* values, int count, double y_ref, double xscale, double x0, ImPlotShadedFlags flags, int offset, int stride); \
1810 template IMPLOT_API void PlotShaded<T>(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, int count, double y_ref, ImPlotShadedFlags flags, int offset, int stride); \
1811 template IMPLOT_API void PlotShaded<T>(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys1, const T* ys2, int count, ImPlotShadedFlags flags, int offset, int stride);
1812CALL_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES()
1813#undef INSTANTIATE_MACRO
1814
1815// custom
1816void PlotShadedG(const char* label_id, ImPlotGetter getter_func1, void* data1, ImPlotGetter getter_func2, void* data2, int count, ImPlotShadedFlags flags) {
1817 GetterFuncPtr getter1(getter_func1, data1, count);
1818 GetterFuncPtr getter2(getter_func2, data2, count);
1819 PlotShadedEx(label_id, getter1, getter2, flags);
1820}
1821
1822//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1823// [SECTION] PlotBars
1824//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1825
1826template <typename Getter1, typename Getter2>
1827void PlotBarsVEx(const char* label_id, const Getter1& getter1, const Getter2 getter2, double width, ImPlotBarsFlags flags) {
1828 if (BeginItemEx(label_id, FitterBarV<Getter1,Getter2>(getter1,getter2,width), flags, ImPlotCol_Fill)) {
1829 if (getter1.Count <= 0 || getter2.Count <= 0) {
1830 EndItem();
1831 return;
1832 }
1833 const ImPlotNextItemData& s = GetItemData();
1834 const ImU32 col_fill = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Fill]);
1835 const ImU32 col_line = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Line]);
1836 bool rend_fill = s.RenderFill;
1837 bool rend_line = s.RenderLine;
1838 if (rend_fill) {
1839 RenderPrimitives2<RendererBarsFillV>(getter1,getter2,col_fill,width);
1840 if (rend_line && col_fill == col_line)
1841 rend_line = false;
1842 }
1843 if (rend_line) {
1844 RenderPrimitives2<RendererBarsLineV>(getter1,getter2,col_line,width,s.LineWeight);
1845 }
1846 EndItem();
1847 }
1848}
1849
1850template <typename Getter1, typename Getter2>
1851void PlotBarsHEx(const char* label_id, const Getter1& getter1, const Getter2& getter2, double height, ImPlotBarsFlags flags) {
1852 if (BeginItemEx(label_id, FitterBarH<Getter1,Getter2>(getter1,getter2,height), flags, ImPlotCol_Fill)) {
1853 if (getter1.Count <= 0 || getter2.Count <= 0) {
1854 EndItem();
1855 return;
1856 }
1857 const ImPlotNextItemData& s = GetItemData();
1858 const ImU32 col_fill = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Fill]);
1859 const ImU32 col_line = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Line]);
1860 bool rend_fill = s.RenderFill;
1861 bool rend_line = s.RenderLine;
1862 if (rend_fill) {
1863 RenderPrimitives2<RendererBarsFillH>(getter1,getter2,col_fill,height);
1864 if (rend_line && col_fill == col_line)
1865 rend_line = false;
1866 }
1867 if (rend_line) {
1868 RenderPrimitives2<RendererBarsLineH>(getter1,getter2,col_line,height,s.LineWeight);
1869 }
1870 EndItem();
1871 }
1872}
1873
1874template <typename T>
1875void PlotBars(const char* label_id, const T* values, int count, double bar_size, double shift, ImPlotBarsFlags flags, int offset, int stride) {
1876 if (ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotBarsFlags_Horizontal)) {
1877 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerLin> getter1(IndexerIdx<T>(values,count,offset,stride),IndexerLin(1.0,shift),count);
1878 GetterXY<IndexerConst,IndexerLin> getter2(IndexerConst(0),IndexerLin(1.0,shift),count);
1879 PlotBarsHEx(label_id, getter1, getter2, bar_size, flags);
1880 }
1881 else {
1882 GetterXY<IndexerLin,IndexerIdx<T>> getter1(IndexerLin(1.0,shift),IndexerIdx<T>(values,count,offset,stride),count);
1883 GetterXY<IndexerLin,IndexerConst> getter2(IndexerLin(1.0,shift),IndexerConst(0),count);
1884 PlotBarsVEx(label_id, getter1, getter2, bar_size, flags);
1885 }
1886}
1887
1888template <typename T>
1889void PlotBars(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, int count, double bar_size, ImPlotBarsFlags flags, int offset, int stride) {
1890 if (ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotBarsFlags_Horizontal)) {
1891 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>> getter1(IndexerIdx<T>(xs,count,offset,stride),IndexerIdx<T>(ys,count,offset,stride),count);
1892 GetterXY<IndexerConst, IndexerIdx<T>> getter2(IndexerConst(0),IndexerIdx<T>(ys,count,offset,stride),count);
1893 PlotBarsHEx(label_id, getter1, getter2, bar_size, flags);
1894 }
1895 else {
1896 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>> getter1(IndexerIdx<T>(xs,count,offset,stride),IndexerIdx<T>(ys,count,offset,stride),count);
1897 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerConst> getter2(IndexerIdx<T>(xs,count,offset,stride),IndexerConst(0),count);
1898 PlotBarsVEx(label_id, getter1, getter2, bar_size, flags);
1899 }
1900}
1901
1902#define INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T) \
1903 template IMPLOT_API void PlotBars<T>(const char* label_id, const T* values, int count, double bar_size, double shift, ImPlotBarsFlags flags, int offset, int stride); \
1904 template IMPLOT_API void PlotBars<T>(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, int count, double bar_size, ImPlotBarsFlags flags, int offset, int stride);
1905CALL_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES()
1906#undef INSTANTIATE_MACRO
1907
1908void PlotBarsG(const char* label_id, ImPlotGetter getter_func, void* data, int count, double bar_size, ImPlotBarsFlags flags) {
1909 if (ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotBarsFlags_Horizontal)) {
1910 GetterFuncPtr getter1(getter_func, data, count);
1911 GetterOverrideX<GetterFuncPtr> getter2(getter1,0);
1912 PlotBarsHEx(label_id, getter1, getter2, bar_size, flags);
1913 }
1914 else {
1915 GetterFuncPtr getter1(getter_func, data, count);
1916 GetterOverrideY<GetterFuncPtr> getter2(getter1,0);
1917 PlotBarsVEx(label_id, getter1, getter2, bar_size, flags);
1918 }
1919}
1920
1921//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1922// [SECTION] PlotBarGroups
1923//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1924
1925template <typename T>
1926void PlotBarGroups(const char* const label_ids[], const T* values, int item_count, int group_count, double group_size, double shift, ImPlotBarGroupsFlags flags) {
1927 const bool horz = ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotBarGroupsFlags_Horizontal);
1928 const bool stack = ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotBarGroupsFlags_Stacked);
1929 if (stack) {
1930 SetupLock();
1931 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
1932 gp.TempDouble1.resize(4*group_count);
1933 double* temp = gp.TempDouble1.Data;
1934 double* neg = &temp[0];
1935 double* pos = &temp[group_count];
1936 double* curr_min = &temp[group_count*2];
1937 double* curr_max = &temp[group_count*3];
1938 for (int g = 0; g < group_count*2; ++g)
1939 temp[g] = 0;
1940 if (horz) {
1941 for (int i = 0; i < item_count; ++i) {
1942 if (!IsItemHidden(label_ids[i])) {
1943 for (int g = 0; g < group_count; ++g) {
1944 double v = (double)values[i*group_count+g];
1945 if (v > 0) {
1946 curr_min[g] = pos[g];
1947 curr_max[g] = curr_min[g] + v;
1948 pos[g] += v;
1949 }
1950 else {
1951 curr_max[g] = neg[g];
1952 curr_min[g] = curr_max[g] + v;
1953 neg[g] += v;
1954 }
1955 }
1956 }
1957 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<double>,IndexerLin> getter1(IndexerIdx<double>(curr_min,group_count),IndexerLin(1.0,shift),group_count);
1958 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<double>,IndexerLin> getter2(IndexerIdx<double>(curr_max,group_count),IndexerLin(1.0,shift),group_count);
1959 PlotBarsHEx(label_ids[i],getter1,getter2,group_size,0);
1960 }
1961 }
1962 else {
1963 for (int i = 0; i < item_count; ++i) {
1964 if (!IsItemHidden(label_ids[i])) {
1965 for (int g = 0; g < group_count; ++g) {
1966 double v = (double)values[i*group_count+g];
1967 if (v > 0) {
1968 curr_min[g] = pos[g];
1969 curr_max[g] = curr_min[g] + v;
1970 pos[g] += v;
1971 }
1972 else {
1973 curr_max[g] = neg[g];
1974 curr_min[g] = curr_max[g] + v;
1975 neg[g] += v;
1976 }
1977 }
1978 }
1979 GetterXY<IndexerLin,IndexerIdx<double>> getter1(IndexerLin(1.0,shift),IndexerIdx<double>(curr_min,group_count),group_count);
