1980 GetterXY<IndexerLin,IndexerIdx<double>> getter2(IndexerLin(1.0,shift),IndexerIdx<double>(curr_max,group_count),group_count);
1981 PlotBarsVEx(label_ids[i],getter1,getter2,group_size,0);
1982 }
1983 }
1984 }
1985 else {
1986 const double subsize = group_size / item_count;
1987 if (horz) {
1988 for (int i = 0; i < item_count; ++i) {
1989 const double subshift = (i+0.5)*subsize - group_size/2;
1990 PlotBars(label_ids[i],&values[i*group_count],group_count,subsize,subshift+shift,ImPlotBarsFlags_Horizontal);
1991 }
1992 }
1993 else {
1994 for (int i = 0; i < item_count; ++i) {
1995 const double subshift = (i+0.5)*subsize - group_size/2;
1996 PlotBars(label_ids[i],&values[i*group_count],group_count,subsize,subshift+shift);
1997 }
1998 }
1999 }
2000}
2001
2002#define INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T) template IMPLOT_API void PlotBarGroups<T>(const char* const label_ids[], const T* values, int items, int groups, double width, double shift, ImPlotBarGroupsFlags flags);
2003CALL_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES()
2004#undef INSTANTIATE_MACRO
2005
2006//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2007// [SECTION] PlotErrorBars
2008//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2009
2010template <typename _GetterPos, typename _GetterNeg>
2011void PlotErrorBarsVEx(const char* label_id, const _GetterPos& getter_pos, const _GetterNeg& getter_neg, ImPlotErrorBarsFlags flags) {
2012 if (BeginItemEx(label_id, Fitter2<_GetterPos,_GetterNeg>(getter_pos, getter_neg), flags, IMPLOT_AUTO)) {
2013 if (getter_pos.Count <= 0 || getter_neg.Count <= 0) {
2014 EndItem();
2015 return;
2016 }
2017 const ImPlotNextItemData& s = GetItemData();
2018 ImDrawList& draw_list = *GetPlotDrawList();
2019 const ImU32 col = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_ErrorBar]);
2020 const bool rend_whisker = s.ErrorBarSize > 0;
2021 const float half_whisker = s.ErrorBarSize * 0.5f;
2022 for (int i = 0; i < getter_pos.Count; ++i) {
2023 ImVec2 p1 = PlotToPixels(getter_neg(i),IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
2024 ImVec2 p2 = PlotToPixels(getter_pos(i),IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
2025 draw_list.AddLine(p1,p2,col, s.ErrorBarWeight);
2026 if (rend_whisker) {
2027 draw_list.AddLine(p1 - ImVec2(half_whisker, 0), p1 + ImVec2(half_whisker, 0), col, s.ErrorBarWeight);
2028 draw_list.AddLine(p2 - ImVec2(half_whisker, 0), p2 + ImVec2(half_whisker, 0), col, s.ErrorBarWeight);
2029 }
2030 }
2031 EndItem();
2032 }
2033}
2034
2035template <typename _GetterPos, typename _GetterNeg>
2036void PlotErrorBarsHEx(const char* label_id, const _GetterPos& getter_pos, const _GetterNeg& getter_neg, ImPlotErrorBarsFlags flags) {
2037 if (BeginItemEx(label_id, Fitter2<_GetterPos,_GetterNeg>(getter_pos, getter_neg), flags, IMPLOT_AUTO)) {
2038 if (getter_pos.Count <= 0 || getter_neg.Count <= 0) {
2039 EndItem();
2040 return;
2041 }
2042 const ImPlotNextItemData& s = GetItemData();
2043 ImDrawList& draw_list = *GetPlotDrawList();
2044 const ImU32 col = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_ErrorBar]);
2045 const bool rend_whisker = s.ErrorBarSize > 0;
2046 const float half_whisker = s.ErrorBarSize * 0.5f;
2047 for (int i = 0; i < getter_pos.Count; ++i) {
2048 ImVec2 p1 = PlotToPixels(getter_neg(i),IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
2049 ImVec2 p2 = PlotToPixels(getter_pos(i),IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
2050 draw_list.AddLine(p1, p2, col, s.ErrorBarWeight);
2051 if (rend_whisker) {
2052 draw_list.AddLine(p1 - ImVec2(0, half_whisker), p1 + ImVec2(0, half_whisker), col, s.ErrorBarWeight);
2053 draw_list.AddLine(p2 - ImVec2(0, half_whisker), p2 + ImVec2(0, half_whisker), col, s.ErrorBarWeight);
2054 }
2055 }
2056 EndItem();
2057 }
2058}
2059
2060template <typename T>
2061void PlotErrorBars(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, const T* err, int count, ImPlotErrorBarsFlags flags, int offset, int stride) {
2062 PlotErrorBars(label_id, xs, ys, err, err, count, flags, offset, stride);
2063}
2064
2065template <typename T>
2066void PlotErrorBars(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, const T* neg, const T* pos, int count, ImPlotErrorBarsFlags flags, int offset, int stride) {
2067 IndexerIdx<T> indexer_x(xs, count,offset,stride);
2068 IndexerIdx<T> indexer_y(ys, count,offset,stride);
2069 IndexerIdx<T> indexer_n(neg,count,offset,stride);
2070 IndexerIdx<T> indexer_p(pos,count,offset,stride);
2071 GetterError<T> getter(xs, ys, neg, pos, count, offset, stride);
2072 if (ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotErrorBarsFlags_Horizontal)) {
2073 IndexerAdd<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>> indexer_xp(indexer_x, indexer_p, 1, 1);
2074 IndexerAdd<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>> indexer_xn(indexer_x, indexer_n, 1, -1);
2075 GetterXY<IndexerAdd<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>>,IndexerIdx<T>> getter_p(indexer_xp, indexer_y, count);
2076 GetterXY<IndexerAdd<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>>,IndexerIdx<T>> getter_n(indexer_xn, indexer_y, count);
2077 PlotErrorBarsHEx(label_id, getter_p, getter_n, flags);
2078 }
2079 else {
2080 IndexerAdd<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>> indexer_yp(indexer_y, indexer_p, 1, 1);
2081 IndexerAdd<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>> indexer_yn(indexer_y, indexer_n, 1, -1);
2082 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerAdd<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>>> getter_p(indexer_x, indexer_yp, count);
2083 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerAdd<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>>> getter_n(indexer_x, indexer_yn, count);
2084 PlotErrorBarsVEx(label_id, getter_p, getter_n, flags);
2085 }
2086}
2087
2088#define INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T) \
2089 template IMPLOT_API void PlotErrorBars<T>(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, const T* err, int count, ImPlotErrorBarsFlags flags, int offset, int stride); \
2090 template IMPLOT_API void PlotErrorBars<T>(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, const T* neg, const T* pos, int count, ImPlotErrorBarsFlags flags, int offset, int stride);
2091CALL_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES()
2092#undef INSTANTIATE_MACRO
2093
2094//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2095// [SECTION] PlotStems
2096//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2097
2098template <typename _GetterM, typename _GetterB>
2099void PlotStemsEx(const char* label_id, const _GetterM& getter_mark, const _GetterB& getter_base, ImPlotStemsFlags flags) {
2100 if (BeginItemEx(label_id, Fitter2<_GetterM,_GetterB>(getter_mark,getter_base), flags, ImPlotCol_Line)) {
2101 if (getter_mark.Count <= 0 || getter_base.Count <= 0) {
2102 EndItem();
2103 return;
2104 }
2105 const ImPlotNextItemData& s = GetItemData();
2106 // render stems
2107 if (s.RenderLine) {
2108 const ImU32 col_line = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Line]);
2109 RenderPrimitives2<RendererLineSegments2>(getter_mark, getter_base, col_line, s.LineWeight);
2110 }
2111 // render markers
2112 if (s.Marker != ImPlotMarker_None) {
2113 PopPlotClipRect();
2114 PushPlotClipRect(s.MarkerSize);
2115 const ImU32 col_line = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerOutline]);
2116 const ImU32 col_fill = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_MarkerFill]);
2117 RenderMarkers<_GetterM>(getter_mark, s.Marker, s.MarkerSize, s.RenderMarkerFill, col_fill, s.RenderMarkerLine, col_line, s.MarkerWeight);
2118 }
2119 EndItem();
2120 }
2121}
2122
2123template <typename T>
2124void PlotStems(const char* label_id, const T* values, int count, double ref, double scale, double start, ImPlotStemsFlags flags, int offset, int stride) {
2125 if (ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotStemsFlags_Horizontal)) {
2126 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerLin> get_mark(IndexerIdx<T>(values,count,offset,stride),IndexerLin(scale,start),count);
2127 GetterXY<IndexerConst,IndexerLin> get_base(IndexerConst(ref),IndexerLin(scale,start),count);
2128 PlotStemsEx(label_id, get_mark, get_base, flags);
2129 }
2130 else {
2131 GetterXY<IndexerLin,IndexerIdx<T>> get_mark(IndexerLin(scale,start),IndexerIdx<T>(values,count,offset,stride),count);
2132 GetterXY<IndexerLin,IndexerConst> get_base(IndexerLin(scale,start),IndexerConst(ref),count);
2133 PlotStemsEx(label_id, get_mark, get_base, flags);
2134 }
2135}
2136
2137template <typename T>
2138void PlotStems(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, int count, double ref, ImPlotStemsFlags flags, int offset, int stride) {
2139 if (ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotStemsFlags_Horizontal)) {
2140 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>> get_mark(IndexerIdx<T>(xs,count,offset,stride),IndexerIdx<T>(ys,count,offset,stride),count);
2141 GetterXY<IndexerConst,IndexerIdx<T>> get_base(IndexerConst(ref),IndexerIdx<T>(ys,count,offset,stride),count);
2142 PlotStemsEx(label_id, get_mark, get_base, flags);
2143 }
2144 else {
2145 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>> get_mark(IndexerIdx<T>(xs,count,offset,stride),IndexerIdx<T>(ys,count,offset,stride),count);
2146 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerConst> get_base(IndexerIdx<T>(xs,count,offset,stride),IndexerConst(ref),count);
2147 PlotStemsEx(label_id, get_mark, get_base, flags);
2148 }
2149}
2150
2151#define INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T) \
2152 template IMPLOT_API void PlotStems<T>(const char* label_id, const T* values, int count, double ref, double scale, double start, ImPlotStemsFlags flags, int offset, int stride); \
2153 template IMPLOT_API void PlotStems<T>(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, int count, double ref, ImPlotStemsFlags flags, int offset, int stride);
2154CALL_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES()
2155#undef INSTANTIATE_MACRO
2156
2157
2158//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2159// [SECTION] PlotInfLines
2160//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2161
2162template <typename T>
2163void PlotInfLines(const char* label_id, const T* values, int count, ImPlotInfLinesFlags flags, int offset, int stride) {
2164 const ImPlotRect lims = GetPlotLimits(IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
2165 if (ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotInfLinesFlags_Horizontal)) {
2166 GetterXY<IndexerConst,IndexerIdx<T>> getter_min(IndexerConst(lims.X.Min),IndexerIdx<T>(values,count,offset,stride),count);
2167 GetterXY<IndexerConst,IndexerIdx<T>> getter_max(IndexerConst(lims.X.Max),IndexerIdx<T>(values,count,offset,stride),count);
2168 if (BeginItemEx(label_id, FitterY<GetterXY<IndexerConst,IndexerIdx<T>>>(getter_min), flags, ImPlotCol_Line)) {
2169 if (count <= 0) {
2170 EndItem();
2171 return;
2172 }
2173 const ImPlotNextItemData& s = GetItemData();
2174 const ImU32 col_line = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Line]);
2175 if (s.RenderLine)
2176 RenderPrimitives2<RendererLineSegments2>(getter_min, getter_max, col_line, s.LineWeight);
2177 EndItem();
2178 }
2179 }
2180 else {
2181 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerConst> get_min(IndexerIdx<T>(values,count,offset,stride),IndexerConst(lims.Y.Min),count);
2182 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerConst> get_max(IndexerIdx<T>(values,count,offset,stride),IndexerConst(lims.Y.Max),count);
2183 if (BeginItemEx(label_id, FitterX<GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerConst>>(get_min), flags, ImPlotCol_Line)) {
2184 if (count <= 0) {
2185 EndItem();
2186 return;
2187 }
2188 const ImPlotNextItemData& s = GetItemData();
2189 const ImU32 col_line = ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Line]);
2190 if (s.RenderLine)
2191 RenderPrimitives2<RendererLineSegments2>(get_min, get_max, col_line, s.LineWeight);
2192 EndItem();
2193 }
2194 }
2195}
2196#define INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T) template IMPLOT_API void PlotInfLines<T>(const char* label_id, const T* xs, int count, ImPlotInfLinesFlags flags, int offset, int stride);
2197CALL_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES()
2198#undef INSTANTIATE_MACRO
2199
2200//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2201// [SECTION] PlotPieChart
2202//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2203
2204IMPLOT_INLINE void RenderPieSlice(ImDrawList& draw_list, const ImPlotPoint& center, double radius, double a0, double a1, ImU32 col, bool detached = false) {
2205 const float resolution = 50 / (2 * IM_PI);
2206 ImVec2 buffer[52];
2207
2208 int n = ImMax(3, (int)((a1 - a0) * resolution));
2209 double da = (a1 - a0) / (n - 1);
2210 int i = 0;
2211
2212 if (detached) {
2213 const double offset = 0.08; // Offset of the detached slice
2214 const double width_scale = 0.95; // Scale factor for the width of the detached slice
2215
2216 double a_mid = (a0 + a1) / 2;
2217 double new_a0 = a_mid - (a1 - a0) * width_scale / 2;
2218 double new_a1 = a_mid + (a1 - a0) * width_scale / 2;
2219 double new_da = (new_a1 - new_a0) / (n - 1);
2220
2221 ImPlotPoint offsetCenter(center.x + offset * cos(a_mid), center.y + offset * sin(a_mid));
2222
2223 // Start point (center of the offset)
2224 buffer[0] = PlotToPixels(offsetCenter, IMPLOT_AUTO, IMPLOT_AUTO);
2225
2226 for (; i < n; ++i) {
2227 double a = new_a0 + i * new_da;
2228 buffer[i + 1] = PlotToPixels(
2229 offsetCenter.x + (radius + offset/2) * cos(a),
2230 offsetCenter.y + (radius + offset/2) * sin(a),
2231 IMPLOT_AUTO, IMPLOT_AUTO
2232 );
2233 }
2234
2235 } else {
2236 buffer[0] = PlotToPixels(center, IMPLOT_AUTO, IMPLOT_AUTO);
2237 for (; i < n; ++i) {
2238 double a = a0 + i * da;
2239 buffer[i + 1] = PlotToPixels(
2240 center.x + radius * cos(a),
2241 center.y + radius * sin(a),
2242 IMPLOT_AUTO, IMPLOT_AUTO);
2243 }
2244 }
2245 // Close the shape
2246 buffer[i + 1] = buffer[0];
2247
2248 // fill
2249 draw_list.AddConvexPolyFilled(buffer, n + 2, col);
2250
2251 // border (for AA)
2252 draw_list.AddPolyline(buffer, n + 2, col, 0, 2.0f);
2253}
2254
2255template <typename T>
2256double PieChartSum(const T* values, int count, bool ignore_hidden) {
2257 double sum = 0;
2258 if (ignore_hidden) {
2259 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2260 ImPlotItemGroup& Items = *gp.CurrentItems;
2261 for (int i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
2262 if (i >= Items.GetItemCount())
2263 break;
2264
2265 ImPlotItem* item = Items.GetItemByIndex(i);
2266 IM_ASSERT(item != nullptr);
2267 if (item->Show) {
2268 sum += (double)values[i];
2269 }
2270 }
2271 }
2272 else {
2273 for (int i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
2274 sum += (double)values[i];
2275 }
2276 }
2277 return sum;
2278}
2279
2280template <typename T>
2281void PlotPieChartEx(const char* const label_ids[], const T* values, int count, ImPlotPoint center, double radius, double angle0, ImPlotPieChartFlags flags) {
2282 ImDrawList& draw_list = *GetPlotDrawList();
2283
2284 const bool ignore_hidden = ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotPieChartFlags_IgnoreHidden);
2285 const double sum = PieChartSum(values, count, ignore_hidden);
2286 const bool normalize = ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotPieChartFlags_Normalize) || sum > 1.0;
2287
2288 double a0 = angle0 * 2 * IM_PI / 360.0;
2289 double a1 = angle0 * 2 * IM_PI / 360.0;
2290 ImPlotPoint Pmin = ImPlotPoint(center.x - radius, center.y - radius);
2291 ImPlotPoint Pmax = ImPlotPoint(center.x + radius, center.y + radius);
2292 for (int i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
2293 ImPlotItem* item = GetItem(label_ids[i]);
2294 const double percent = normalize ? (double)values[i] / sum : (double)values[i];
2295 const bool skip = sum <= 0.0 || (ignore_hidden && item != nullptr && !item->Show);
2296 if (!skip)
2297 a1 = a0 + 2 * IM_PI * percent;
2298
2299 if (BeginItemEx(label_ids[i], FitterRect(Pmin, Pmax))) {
2300 const bool hovered = ImPlot::IsLegendEntryHovered(label_ids[i]) && ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotPieChartFlags_Exploding);
2301 if (sum > 0.0) {
2302 ImU32 col = GetCurrentItem()->Color;
2303 if (percent < 0.5) {
2304 RenderPieSlice(draw_list, center, radius, a0, a1, col, hovered);
2305 }
2306 else {
2307 RenderPieSlice(draw_list, center, radius, a0, a0 + (a1 - a0) * 0.5, col, hovered);
2308 RenderPieSlice(draw_list, center, radius, a0 + (a1 - a0) * 0.5, a1, col, hovered);
2309 }
2310 }
2311 EndItem();
2312 }
2313 if (!skip)
2314 a0 = a1;
2315 }
2316}
2317
2318int PieChartFormatter(double value, char* buff, int size, void* data) {
2319 const char* fmt = (const char*)data;
2320 return snprintf(buff, size, fmt, value);
2321}
2322
2323template <typename T>
2324void PlotPieChart(const char* const label_ids[], const T* values, int count, double x, double y, double radius, const char* fmt, double angle0, ImPlotPieChartFlags flags) {
2325 PlotPieChart<T>(label_ids, values, count, x, y, radius, PieChartFormatter, (void*)fmt, angle0, flags);
2326}
2327#define INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T) template IMPLOT_API void PlotPieChart<T>(const char* const label_ids[], const T* values, int count, double x, double y, double radius, const char* fmt, double angle0, ImPlotPieChartFlags flags);
2328CALL_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES()
2329#undef INSTANTIATE_MACRO
2330
2331template <typename T>
2332void PlotPieChart(const char* const label_ids[], const T* values, int count, double x, double y, double radius, ImPlotFormatter fmt, void* fmt_data, double angle0, ImPlotPieChartFlags flags) {
2333 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(GImPlot->CurrentPlot != nullptr, "PlotPieChart() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
2334 ImDrawList& draw_list = *GetPlotDrawList();
2335
2336 const bool ignore_hidden = ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotPieChartFlags_IgnoreHidden);
2337 const double sum = PieChartSum(values, count, ignore_hidden);
2338 const bool normalize = ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotPieChartFlags_Normalize) || sum > 1.0;
2339 ImPlotPoint center(x, y);
2340
2341 PushPlotClipRect();
2342 PlotPieChartEx(label_ids, values, count, center, radius, angle0, flags);
2343 if (fmt != nullptr) {
2344 double a0 = angle0 * 2 * IM_PI / 360.0;
2345 double a1 = angle0 * 2 * IM_PI / 360.0;
2346 char buffer[32];
2347 for (int i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
2348 ImPlotItem* item = GetItem(label_ids[i]);
2349 IM_ASSERT(item != nullptr);
2350
2351 const double percent = normalize ? (double)values[i] / sum : (double)values[i];
2352 const bool skip = ignore_hidden && item != nullptr && !item->Show;
2353
2354 if (!skip) {
2355 a1 = a0 + 2 * IM_PI * percent;
2356 if (item->Show) {
2357 fmt((double)values[i], buffer, 32, fmt_data);
2358 ImVec2 size = ImGui::CalcTextSize(buffer);
2359 double angle = a0 + (a1 - a0) * 0.5;
2360 const bool hovered = ImPlot::IsLegendEntryHovered(label_ids[i]) && ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotPieChartFlags_Exploding);
2361 const double offset = (hovered ? 0.6 : 0.5) * radius;
2362 ImVec2 pos = PlotToPixels(center.x + offset * cos(angle), center.y + offset * sin(angle), IMPLOT_AUTO, IMPLOT_AUTO);
2363 ImU32 col = CalcTextColor(ImGui::ColorConvertU32ToFloat4(item->Color));
2364 draw_list.AddText(pos - size * 0.5f, col, buffer);
2365 }
2366 a0 = a1;
2367 }
2368 }
2369 }
2370 PopPlotClipRect();
2371}
2372#define INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T) template IMPLOT_API void PlotPieChart(const char* const label_ids[], const T* values, int count, double x, double y, double radius, ImPlotFormatter fmt, void* fmt_data, double angle0, ImPlotPieChartFlags flags);
2373CALL_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES()
2374#undef INSTANTIATE_MACRO
2375
2376//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2377// [SECTION] PlotHeatmap
2378//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2379
2380template <typename T>
2381struct GetterHeatmapRowMaj {
2382 GetterHeatmapRowMaj(const T* values, int rows, int cols, double scale_min, double scale_max, double width, double height, double xref, double yref, double ydir) :
2383 Values(values),
2384 Count(rows*cols),
2385 Rows(rows),
2386 Cols(cols),
2387 ScaleMin(scale_min),
2388 ScaleMax(scale_max),
2389 Width(width),
2390 Height(height),
2391 XRef(xref),
2392 YRef(yref),
2393 YDir(ydir),
2394 HalfSize(Width*0.5, Height*0.5)
2395 { }
2396 template <typename I> IMPLOT_INLINE RectC operator()(I idx) const {
2397 double val = (double)Values[idx];
2398 const int r = idx / Cols;
2399 const int c = idx % Cols;
2400 const ImPlotPoint p(XRef + HalfSize.x + c*Width, YRef + YDir * (HalfSize.y + r*Height));
2401 RectC rect;
2402 rect.Pos = p;
2403 rect.HalfSize = HalfSize;
2404 const float t = ImClamp((float)ImRemap01(val, ScaleMin, ScaleMax),0.0f,1.0f);
2405 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2406 rect.Color = gp.ColormapData.LerpTable(gp.Style.Colormap, t);
2407 return rect;
2408 }
2409 const T* const Values;
2410 const int Count, Rows, Cols;
2411 const double ScaleMin, ScaleMax, Width, Height, XRef, YRef, YDir;
2412 const ImPlotPoint HalfSize;
2413};
2414
2415template <typename T>
2416struct GetterHeatmapColMaj {
2417 GetterHeatmapColMaj(const T* values, int rows, int cols, double scale_min, double scale_max, double width, double height, double xref, double yref, double ydir) :
2418 Values(values),
2419 Count(rows*cols),
2420 Rows(rows),
2421 Cols(cols),
2422 ScaleMin(scale_min),
2423 ScaleMax(scale_max),
2424 Width(width),
2425 Height(height),
2426 XRef(xref),
2427 YRef(yref),
2428 YDir(ydir),
2429 HalfSize(Width*0.5, Height*0.5)
2430 { }
2431 template <typename I> IMPLOT_INLINE RectC operator()(I idx) const {
2432 double val = (double)Values[idx];
2433 const int r = idx % Rows;
2434 const int c = idx / Rows;
2435 const ImPlotPoint p(XRef + HalfSize.x + c*Width, YRef + YDir * (HalfSize.y + r*Height));
2436 RectC rect;
2437 rect.Pos = p;
2438 rect.HalfSize = HalfSize;
2439 const float t = ImClamp((float)ImRemap01(val, ScaleMin, ScaleMax),0.0f,1.0f);
2440 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2441 rect.Color = gp.ColormapData.LerpTable(gp.Style.Colormap, t);
2442 return rect;
2443 }
2444 const T* const Values;
2445 const int Count, Rows, Cols;
2446 const double ScaleMin, ScaleMax, Width, Height, XRef, YRef, YDir;
2447 const ImPlotPoint HalfSize;
2448};
2449
2450template <typename T>
2451void RenderHeatmap(ImDrawList& draw_list, const T* values, int rows, int cols, double scale_min, double scale_max, const char* fmt, const ImPlotPoint& bounds_min, const ImPlotPoint& bounds_max, bool reverse_y, bool col_maj) {
2452 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2453 Transformer2 transformer;
2454 if (scale_min == 0 && scale_max == 0) {
2455 T temp_min, temp_max;
2456 ImMinMaxArray(values,rows*cols,&temp_min,&temp_max);
2457 scale_min = (double)temp_min;
2458 scale_max = (double)temp_max;
2459 }
2460 if (scale_min == scale_max) {
2461 ImVec2 a = transformer(bounds_min);
2462 ImVec2 b = transformer(bounds_max);
2463 ImU32 col = GetColormapColorU32(0,gp.Style.Colormap);
2464 draw_list.AddRectFilled(a, b, col);
2465 return;
2466 }
2467 const double yref = reverse_y ? bounds_max.y : bounds_min.y;
2468 const double ydir = reverse_y ? -1 : 1;
2469 if (col_maj) {
2470 GetterHeatmapColMaj<T> getter(values, rows, cols, scale_min, scale_max, (bounds_max.x - bounds_min.x) / cols, (bounds_max.y - bounds_min.y) / rows, bounds_min.x, yref, ydir);
2471 RenderPrimitives1<RendererRectC>(getter);
2472 }
2473 else {
2474 GetterHeatmapRowMaj<T> getter(values, rows, cols, scale_min, scale_max, (bounds_max.x - bounds_min.x) / cols, (bounds_max.y - bounds_min.y) / rows, bounds_min.x, yref, ydir);
2475 RenderPrimitives1<RendererRectC>(getter);
2476 }
2477 // labels
2478 if (fmt != nullptr) {
2479 const double w = (bounds_max.x - bounds_min.x) / cols;
2480 const double h = (bounds_max.y - bounds_min.y) / rows;
2481 const ImPlotPoint half_size(w*0.5,h*0.5);
2482 int i = 0;
2483 if (col_maj) {
2484 for (int c = 0; c < cols; ++c) {
2485 for (int r = 0; r < rows; ++r) {
2486 ImPlotPoint p;
2487 p.x = bounds_min.x + 0.5*w + c*w;
2488 p.y = yref + ydir * (0.5*h + r*h);
2489 ImVec2 px = transformer(p);
2490 char buff[32];
2491 ImFormatString(buff, 32, fmt, values[i]);
2492 ImVec2 size = ImGui::CalcTextSize(buff);
2493 double t = ImClamp(ImRemap01((double)values[i], scale_min, scale_max),0.0,1.0);
2494 ImVec4 color = SampleColormap((float)t);
2495 ImU32 col = CalcTextColor(color);
2496 draw_list.AddText(px - size * 0.5f, col, buff);
2497 i++;
2498 }
2499 }
2500 }
2501 else {
2502 for (int r = 0; r < rows; ++r) {
2503 for (int c = 0; c < cols; ++c) {
2504 ImPlotPoint p;
2505 p.x = bounds_min.x + 0.5*w + c*w;
2506 p.y = yref + ydir * (0.5*h + r*h);
2507 ImVec2 px = transformer(p);
2508 char buff[32];
2509 ImFormatString(buff, 32, fmt, values[i]);
2510 ImVec2 size = ImGui::CalcTextSize(buff);
2511 double t = ImClamp(ImRemap01((double)values[i], scale_min, scale_max),0.0,1.0);
2512 ImVec4 color = SampleColormap((float)t);
2513 ImU32 col = CalcTextColor(color);
2514 draw_list.AddText(px - size * 0.5f, col, buff);
2515 i++;
2516 }
2517 }
2518 }
2519 }
2520}
2521
2522template <typename T>
2523void PlotHeatmap(const char* label_id, const T* values, int rows, int cols, double scale_min, double scale_max, const char* fmt, const ImPlotPoint& bounds_min, const ImPlotPoint& bounds_max, ImPlotHeatmapFlags flags) {
2524 if (BeginItemEx(label_id, FitterRect(bounds_min, bounds_max))) {
2525 if (rows <= 0 || cols <= 0) {
2526 EndItem();
2527 return;
2528 }
2529 ImDrawList& draw_list = *GetPlotDrawList();
2530 const bool col_maj = ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotHeatmapFlags_ColMajor);
2531 RenderHeatmap(draw_list, values, rows, cols, scale_min, scale_max, fmt, bounds_min, bounds_max, true, col_maj);
2532 EndItem();
2533 }
2534}
2535#define INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T) template IMPLOT_API void PlotHeatmap<T>(const char* label_id, const T* values, int rows, int cols, double scale_min, double scale_max, const char* fmt, const ImPlotPoint& bounds_min, const ImPlotPoint& bounds_max, ImPlotHeatmapFlags flags);
2536CALL_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES()
2537#undef INSTANTIATE_MACRO
2538
2539//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2540// [SECTION] PlotHistogram
2541//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2542
2543template <typename T>
2544double PlotHistogram(const char* label_id, const T* values, int count, int bins, double bar_scale, ImPlotRange range, ImPlotHistogramFlags flags) {
2545
2546 const bool cumulative = ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotHistogramFlags_Cumulative);
2547 const bool density = ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotHistogramFlags_Density);
2548 const bool outliers = !ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotHistogramFlags_NoOutliers);
2549
2550 if (count <= 0 || bins == 0)
2551 return 0;
2552
2553 if (range.Min == 0 && range.Max == 0) {
2554 T Min, Max;
2555 ImMinMaxArray(values, count, &Min, &Max);
2556 range.Min = (double)Min;
2557 range.Max = (double)Max;
2558 }
2559
2560 double width;
2561 if (bins < 0)
2562 CalculateBins(values, count, bins, range, bins, width);
2563 else
2564 width = range.Size() / bins;
2565
2566 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2567 ImVector<double>& bin_centers = gp.TempDouble1;
2568 ImVector<double>& bin_counts = gp.TempDouble2;
2569 bin_centers.resize(bins);
2570 bin_counts.resize(bins);
2571 int below = 0;
2572
2573 for (int b = 0; b < bins; ++b) {
2574 bin_centers[b] = range.Min + b * width + width * 0.5;
2575 bin_counts[b] = 0;
2576 }
2577 int counted = 0;
2578 double max_count = 0;
2579 for (int i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
2580 double val = (double)values[i];
2581 if (range.Contains(val)) {
2582 const int b = ImClamp((int)((val - range.Min) / width), 0, bins - 1);
2583 bin_counts[b] += 1.0;
2584 if (bin_counts[b] > max_count)
2585 max_count = bin_counts[b];
2586 counted++;
2587 }
2588 else if (val < range.Min) {
2589 below++;
2590 }
2591 }
2592 if (cumulative && density) {
2593 if (outliers)
2594 bin_counts[0] += below;
2595 for (int b = 1; b < bins; ++b)
2596 bin_counts[b] += bin_counts[b-1];
2597 double scale = 1.0 / (outliers ? count : counted);
2598 for (int b = 0; b < bins; ++b)
2599 bin_counts[b] *= scale;
2600 max_count = bin_counts[bins-1];
2601 }
2602 else if (cumulative) {
2603 if (outliers)
2604 bin_counts[0] += below;
2605 for (int b = 1; b < bins; ++b)
2606 bin_counts[b] += bin_counts[b-1];
2607 max_count = bin_counts[bins-1];
2608 }
2609 else if (density) {
2610 double scale = 1.0 / ((outliers ? count : counted) * width);
2611 for (int b = 0; b < bins; ++b)
2612 bin_counts[b] *= scale;
2613 max_count *= scale;
2614 }
2615 if (ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotHistogramFlags_Horizontal))
2616 PlotBars(label_id, &bin_counts.Data[0], &bin_centers.Data[0], bins, bar_scale*width, ImPlotBarsFlags_Horizontal);
2617 else
2618 PlotBars(label_id, &bin_centers.Data[0], &bin_counts.Data[0], bins, bar_scale*width);
2619 return max_count;
2620}
2621#define INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T) template IMPLOT_API double PlotHistogram<T>(const char* label_id, const T* values, int count, int bins, double bar_scale, ImPlotRange range, ImPlotHistogramFlags flags);
2622CALL_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES()
2623#undef INSTANTIATE_MACRO
2624
2625//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2626// [SECTION] PlotHistogram2D
2627//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2628
2629template <typename T>
2630double PlotHistogram2D(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, int count, int x_bins, int y_bins, ImPlotRect range, ImPlotHistogramFlags flags) {
2631
2632 // const bool cumulative = ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotHistogramFlags_Cumulative); NOT SUPPORTED
2633 const bool density = ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotHistogramFlags_Density);
2634 const bool outliers = !ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotHistogramFlags_NoOutliers);
2635 const bool col_maj = ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotHistogramFlags_ColMajor);
2636
2637 if (count <= 0 || x_bins == 0 || y_bins == 0)
2638 return 0;
2639
2640 if (range.X.Min == 0 && range.X.Max == 0) {
2641 T Min, Max;
2642 ImMinMaxArray(xs, count, &Min, &Max);
2643 range.X.Min = (double)Min;
2644 range.X.Max = (double)Max;
2645 }
2646 if (range.Y.Min == 0 && range.Y.Max == 0) {
2647 T Min, Max;
2648 ImMinMaxArray(ys, count, &Min, &Max);
2649 range.Y.Min = (double)Min;
2650 range.Y.Max = (double)Max;
2651 }
2652
2653 double width, height;
2654 if (x_bins < 0)
2655 CalculateBins(xs, count, x_bins, range.X, x_bins, width);
2656 else
2657 width = range.X.Size() / x_bins;
2658 if (y_bins < 0)
2659 CalculateBins(ys, count, y_bins, range.Y, y_bins, height);
2660 else
2661 height = range.Y.Size() / y_bins;
2662
2663 const int bins = x_bins * y_bins;
2664
2665 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2666 ImVector<double>& bin_counts = gp.TempDouble1;
2667 bin_counts.resize(bins);
2668
2669 for (int b = 0; b < bins; ++b)
2670 bin_counts[b] = 0;
2671
2672 int counted = 0;
2673 double max_count = 0;
2674 for (int i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
2675 if (range.Contains((double)xs[i], (double)ys[i])) {
2676 const int xb = ImClamp( (int)((double)(xs[i] - range.X.Min) / width) , 0, x_bins - 1);
2677 const int yb = ImClamp( (int)((double)(ys[i] - range.Y.Min) / height) , 0, y_bins - 1);
2678 const int b = yb * x_bins + xb;
2679 bin_counts[b] += 1.0;
2680 if (bin_counts[b] > max_count)
2681 max_count = bin_counts[b];
2682 counted++;
2683 }
2684 }
2685 if (density) {
2686 double scale = 1.0 / ((outliers ? count : counted) * width * height);
2687 for (int b = 0; b < bins; ++b)
2688 bin_counts[b] *= scale;
2689 max_count *= scale;
2690 }
2691
2692 if (BeginItemEx(label_id, FitterRect(range))) {
2693 if (y_bins <= 0 || x_bins <= 0) {
2694 EndItem();
2695 return max_count;
2696 }
2697 ImDrawList& draw_list = *GetPlotDrawList();
2698 RenderHeatmap(draw_list, &bin_counts.Data[0], y_bins, x_bins, 0, max_count, nullptr, range.Min(), range.Max(), false, col_maj);
2699 EndItem();
2700 }
2701 return max_count;
2702}
2703#define INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T) template IMPLOT_API double PlotHistogram2D<T>(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, int count, int x_bins, int y_bins, ImPlotRect range, ImPlotHistogramFlags flags);
2704CALL_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES()
2705#undef INSTANTIATE_MACRO
2706
2707//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2708// [SECTION] PlotDigital
2709//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2710
2711// TODO: Make this behave like all the other plot types (.e. not fixed in y axis)
2712
2713template <typename Getter>
2714void PlotDigitalEx(const char* label_id, Getter getter, ImPlotDigitalFlags flags) {
2715 if (BeginItem(label_id, flags, ImPlotCol_Fill)) {
2716 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2717 ImDrawList& draw_list = *GetPlotDrawList();
2718 const ImPlotNextItemData& s = GetItemData();
2719 if (getter.Count > 1 && s.RenderFill) {
2720 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
2721 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = plot.Axes[plot.CurrentX];
2722 ImPlotAxis& y_axis = plot.Axes[plot.CurrentY];
2723
2724 int pixYMax = 0;
2725 ImPlotPoint itemData1 = getter(0);
2726 for (int i = 0; i < getter.Count; ++i) {
2727 ImPlotPoint itemData2 = getter(i);
2728 if (ImNanOrInf(itemData1.y)) {
2729 itemData1 = itemData2;
2730 continue;
2731 }
2732 if (ImNanOrInf(itemData2.y)) itemData2.y = ImConstrainNan(ImConstrainInf(itemData2.y));
2733 int pixY_0 = (int)(s.LineWeight);
2734 itemData1.y = ImMax(0.0, itemData1.y);
2735 const float pixY_1 = s.DigitalBitHeight * (float)itemData1.y;
2736 const int pixY_chPosOffset = (int)(ImMax(s.DigitalBitHeight, pixY_1) + s.DigitalBitGap);
2737 pixYMax = ImMax(pixYMax, pixY_chPosOffset);
2738 ImVec2 pMin = PlotToPixels(itemData1,IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
2739 ImVec2 pMax = PlotToPixels(itemData2,IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
2740 const int pixY_Offset = 0; //20 pixel from bottom due to mouse cursor label
2741 const float y_ref = y_axis.IsInverted() ? y_axis.PixelMax : y_axis.PixelMin;
2742 pMin.y = y_ref - (gp.DigitalPlotOffset + pixY_Offset);
2743 pMax.y = y_ref - (gp.DigitalPlotOffset + pixY_0 + (int)pixY_1 + pixY_Offset);
2744 //plot only one rectangle for same digital state
2745 while (((i+2) < getter.Count) && (itemData1.y == itemData2.y)) {
2746 const int in = (i + 1);
2747 itemData2 = getter(in);
2748 if (ImNanOrInf(itemData2.y)) break;
2749 pMax.x = PlotToPixels(itemData2,IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO).x;
2750 i++;
2751 }
2752 // do not extend plot outside plot range
2753 pMin.x = ImClamp(pMin.x, !x_axis.IsInverted() ? x_axis.PixelMin : x_axis.PixelMax, !x_axis.IsInverted() ? x_axis.PixelMax - 1 : x_axis.PixelMin - 1);
2754 pMax.x = ImClamp(pMax.x, !x_axis.IsInverted() ? x_axis.PixelMin : x_axis.PixelMax, !x_axis.IsInverted() ? x_axis.PixelMax - 1 : x_axis.PixelMin - 1);
2755
2756 //plot a rectangle that extends up to x2 with y1 height
2757 if ((gp.CurrentPlot->PlotRect.Contains(pMin) || gp.CurrentPlot->PlotRect.Contains(pMax))) {
2758 // ImVec4 colAlpha = item->Color;
2759 // colAlpha.w = item->Highlight ? 1.0f : 0.9f;
2760 draw_list.AddRectFilled(pMin, pMax, ImGui::GetColorU32(s.Colors[ImPlotCol_Fill]));
2761 }
2762 itemData1 = itemData2;
2763 }
2764 gp.DigitalPlotItemCnt++;
2765 gp.DigitalPlotOffset += pixYMax;
2766 }
2767 EndItem();
2768 }
2769}
2770
2771
2772template <typename T>
2773void PlotDigital(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, int count, ImPlotDigitalFlags flags, int offset, int stride) {
2774 GetterXY<IndexerIdx<T>,IndexerIdx<T>> getter(IndexerIdx<T>(xs,count,offset,stride),IndexerIdx<T>(ys,count,offset,stride),count);
2775 return PlotDigitalEx(label_id, getter, flags);
2776}
2777#define INSTANTIATE_MACRO(T) template IMPLOT_API void PlotDigital<T>(const char* label_id, const T* xs, const T* ys, int count, ImPlotDigitalFlags flags, int offset, int stride);
2778CALL_INSTANTIATE_FOR_NUMERIC_TYPES()
2779#undef INSTANTIATE_MACRO
2780
2781// custom
2782void PlotDigitalG(const char* label_id, ImPlotGetter getter_func, void* data, int count, ImPlotDigitalFlags flags) {
2783 GetterFuncPtr getter(getter_func,data,count);
2784 return PlotDigitalEx(label_id, getter, flags);
2785}
2786
2787//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2788// [SECTION] PlotImage
2789//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2790
2791#ifdef IMGUI_HAS_TEXTURES
2792void PlotImage(const char* label_id, ImTextureRef tex_ref, const ImPlotPoint& bmin, const ImPlotPoint& bmax, const ImVec2& uv0, const ImVec2& uv1, const ImVec4& tint_col, ImPlotImageFlags) {
2793#else
2794void PlotImage(const char* label_id, ImTextureID tex_ref, const ImPlotPoint& bmin, const ImPlotPoint& bmax, const ImVec2& uv0, const ImVec2& uv1, const ImVec4& tint_col, ImPlotImageFlags) {
2795#endif
2796 if (BeginItemEx(label_id, FitterRect(bmin,bmax))) {
2797 ImU32 tint_col32 = ImGui::ColorConvertFloat4ToU32(tint_col);
2798 GetCurrentItem()->Color = tint_col32;
2799 ImDrawList& draw_list = *GetPlotDrawList();
2800 ImVec2 p1 = PlotToPixels(bmin.x, bmax.y,IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
2801 ImVec2 p2 = PlotToPixels(bmax.x, bmin.y,IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
2802 PushPlotClipRect();
2803 draw_list.AddImage(tex_ref, p1, p2, uv0, uv1, tint_col32);
2804 PopPlotClipRect();
2805 EndItem();
2806 }
2807}
2808
2809//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2810// [SECTION] PlotText
2811//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2812
2813void PlotText(const char* text, double x, double y, const ImVec2& pixel_offset, ImPlotTextFlags flags) {
2814 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(GImPlot->CurrentPlot != nullptr, "PlotText() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
2815 SetupLock();
2816 ImDrawList & draw_list = *GetPlotDrawList();
2817 PushPlotClipRect();
2818 ImU32 colTxt = GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_InlayText);
2819 if (ImHasFlag(flags,ImPlotTextFlags_Vertical)) {
2820 ImVec2 siz = CalcTextSizeVertical(text) * 0.5f;
2821 ImVec2 ctr = siz * 0.5f;
2822 ImVec2 pos = PlotToPixels(ImPlotPoint(x,y),IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO) + ImVec2(-ctr.x, ctr.y) + pixel_offset;
2823 if (FitThisFrame() && !ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotItemFlags_NoFit)) {
2824 FitPoint(PixelsToPlot(pos));
2825 FitPoint(PixelsToPlot(pos.x + siz.x, pos.y - siz.y));
2826 }
2827 AddTextVertical(&draw_list, pos, colTxt, text);
2828 }
2829 else {
2830 ImVec2 siz = ImGui::CalcTextSize(text);
2831 ImVec2 pos = PlotToPixels(ImPlotPoint(x,y),IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO) - siz * 0.5f + pixel_offset;
2832 if (FitThisFrame() && !ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotItemFlags_NoFit)) {
2833 FitPoint(PixelsToPlot(pos));
2834 FitPoint(PixelsToPlot(pos+siz));
2835 }
2836 draw_list.AddText(pos, colTxt, text);
2837 }
2838 PopPlotClipRect();
2839}
2840
2841//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2842// [SECTION] PlotDummy
2843//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2844
2845void PlotDummy(const char* label_id, ImPlotDummyFlags flags) {
2846 if (BeginItem(label_id, flags, ImPlotCol_Line))
2847 EndItem();
2848}
2849
